title: Epsiode 7
overview: Does Tory Lane or Daisy Marie have a shot at being Jenna's next conquest? It takes more than great sex skills to be her new Star.

title: Episode 9
overview: Watch your pants rise up and cheer as we pick a new Sex Star! We're down to the Grind Finale as Ms. Jenna Jameson test out every rockin' body and tastes the next great slice of cherry pie.

title: Danny Had An Affair
overview: The introduction to the life and times of Danny and Gretchen Bonaduce. We learn that Danny and Gretchen meet on a blind date, and married seven hours later during a night of drunkness and passion. Danny and Gretchen go to couples therapy to begin to try and work out their issues, Danny confesses that he has had an affair in the past.

title: Dangerous Behavior
overview: In this episode things appear to be on the mend in the Bonaduce household as the family is functioning “normally” once again. But beware; underneath the happy surface, trouble is brewing.

title: Anger Management
overview: During this episode we along with Dr. Garry discover that Danny has quiet a problem with anger. We learn that Danny runs, works out and even takes karate in an effort to channel some of his excess anxiety.

title: No Time for Love
overview: Danny is becoming frustrated with Gretchen's lack of intimacy. Gretchen plans for her 40th Birthday party.

title: Out of Control
overview: We see Danny on the streets of Hollywood, he was ringing Gretchen's cell phone off the hook trying frantically to warn her against having male strippers at her 40th Birthday ........

title: Breaking the Code
overview: An Undercover cop comes to vince in need of help she has  been undercover so long she has lost her identity,witnessed the murder of her mark and is now trying to figure whether she truly want to stay a police officer. Vince and eddie try to work to discover what  there new working relationship will be

title: Do You Want to Know a Secret?
Episode 1: Great African Grasslands: Savannah
overview: Thanks to a lack of hiding places for predators, the African savannah regions support a much greater diversity of wildlife than temperate grasslands.

title: Episode 2: Water Planet: Open Ocean
overview: They may look uniform from above, but oceans contain a myriad of various underwater habitats. Creatures must make homes wherever survival is assured.

title: Episode 3: Deserts
overview: The desert is an extreme environment where wildlife must adapt to survive. Many animals are nocturnal, surfacing only at night when it is cooler.

title: Episode 4: Amazon Rainforest
overview: The Amazon–a magnificent, broad-leafed rainforest. The heart of Brazil. Rainforests are known as the lungs of our planet. The Amazon is the largest.

title: Episode 5: Masters of the Sky
overview: The masters of the sky are the winged predators of the aerial world. Their bodies and senses have evolved to establish them as master predators

title: Episode 6: Arctic
overview: The Arctic is alive with a fascinating assortment of wildlife and species–hardy breeds uniquely suited to their home at the top of the world.

title: Episode 7: Great Grasslands: American Prairie
overview: Prairies are temperate grasslands—extremely hot in summer and cold in winter. This episode explores the wildlife of the great American prairies.

title: Episode 8: Jungles of Asia
overview: Asia is home to some of the most beautiful rainforests, jungles, and wildlife. Sadly, they are threatened by intensive logging and industrial farming.

title: Episode 9: Swamps and Wetlands
overview: Large areas of water, broken up by small islands. Massive, rapidly-growing vegetation. Swamps, wetlands, marshes, bogs, and fens are found worldwide.

title: Episode 10: Great Barrier Reef
overview: One of Australia's most remarkable natural gifts is the Great Barrier Reef. It supports a vast array of life forms. In this episode, we meet them.

title: Episode 11: Freshwaters
overview: Lakes and rivers are created by streams high in the mountains. Explore the wild lives above, below, and on the surface of freshwater everywhere.

title: Episode 12: Islands
overview: Islands are home to unique flora and fauna. It was, after all, on the Galapagos Islands that Darwin found the inspiration for his theory of evolution.

title: Episode 13: Mountains
overview: Many hoofed and herbivorous mammals such as goats, deer, sheep, and llamas comprise a unique group of wildlife that thrives at high altitudes.

title: The Can
overview: From soup to beer, the aluminum can is a trophy of human ingenuity and is one of the most ubiquitous Man-Made products on the planet. Across the globe, the can is mass produced on a mind-boggling scale: more than 220 billion cans a year, including 600 million a day and 400,000 every minute. It has become a necessity, a technology, an icon, a cultural artifact and even an object of desire. NGC takes you on a journey through the history of this everyday item.

title: The Flashlight
overview: Originally considered a novelty item, The Flashlight has quickly become one of the world's most trusted tools. Each American owns an average of 3 or 4 flashlights, but providing light is not their only function. Join the National Geographic Channel to trace the flashlight's history and take a look at its unexpected role in our lives. From a military flashlight that can blind an enemy to crime-fighting flashlights used to find hidden clues, innovators continue to expand the flashlight's use.

title: South Pole Project
overview: In the South Pole, temperatures can drop to more than 100 degrees below zero Fahrenheit. Now, witness as engineers go up against staggering odds to build a 160,000-square-foot, high-tech science facility in this frozen wasteland. Through exclusive access granted by the National Science Foundation, NGC"s cameras give viewers a glimpse of the intense danger & physical challenges of working in one of most inhospitable places on the planet.

title: Queen Mary 2
overview: Chronicling the two-year construction of the Queen Mary 2, which was the world's longest, tallest and widest passenger ocean liner when it was launched in 2003.

title: Super Roads
overview: A visit across the country for a look at high tech technology concerning highway construction, including the machinery and engineering used to keep traffic moving.

title: Super Sewer
overview: An examination of the Los Angeles sophisticated sewer system, one of the world's largest.

title: Ice Hotel
overview: A hotel is build mainly out of snow and ice in Jukkasjärvi, Sweden, about 125 miles north of the Arctic Circle.

title: The Brewery
overview: An exploration of what goes into the brewing of beer in major breweries, including a look at mass producing.

title: Worlds Biggest Shredder
overview: Experience the mighty mega shredder. The world's largest recycling machine takes the floor space of an entire factory. It will reduce the equivalent of 450 cars an hour to an unrecognizable pulp. And that's just one part of the 9 million tons of scrap metal spit from the jaws of the world's biggest metal shredder every year. Hauling away the fragments of what were once refrigerators and other household goods demands the services of a gargantuan gantry crane. In only 72 hours that crane will fill a 30,000 ton cargo ship that in turn will lug the precious scraps onto the world metal recycling market.

title: Spy Tech
overview: A profile of real life spies and security experts who work in everything from hostage rescues to the creation of high tech gadgets.

title: High Tech Museum
overview: Head to the California Academy of Sciences in San Fransisco to investigate their use of sustainable technology which makes it one of the world's largest green public facilities.

title: Power Tools
overview: A look at the science and engineering involved in the Bahrain World Trade Center, and its trio of 29-meter wind turbines which creates around 11-15% of the buildings energy demands.

title: Ultimate Skyscraper
overview: In the city that never sleeps, one architects dream for a greener future has been realized. The One Bryant Park building in New York City is not only going to be the second tallest building in the city, but is set to be one of the most energy efficient skyscrapers in the world. Richard Cook and his team have taken on an exhilarating challenge to transform the modern approach to green technology. Both groups envisioned breaking new ground in the arena of environmentally conscious skyscrapers, a significant step forward in a city known for massive energy consumption. Join National Geographic as we examine the trials and triumphs of erecting a skyscraper whose blueprints just might map out a new design for our planets future.

title: Artic Icebreakers
overview: Breaking through over 5 feet of ice demands a vessel of incredible power- the Icebreaker. These behemoths keep the worlds shipping lanes open during the harshest of conditions making them vital to the global economy. We follow the construction of a vessel that can break ice and carry cargo at the same time: The Arctic Icebreaking Containership.

title: Bridges of NYC
overview: Follow construction of the Brooklyn Bridge, NYC's first suspension bridge; the George Washington Bridge, the world's busiest bridge; and the Verrazano Narrows, NYC's longest bridge.

title: Coffee: Beans to Buzz
overview: From its African origins to 17th century coffeehouses in Vienna to the ubiquitous Starbucks today, a potent little bean has revolutionized society throughout the ages.

title: Deep Sea Drillers
overview: Five high-tech mega-vessels are building a massive natural gas network below the Gulf of Mexico. This $2-billion project could produce enough gas for five million U.S. households. See what it takes to tap Earth's most inaccessible energy reserves.

title: Earthmovers
overview: A celebration of modern technology. EARTHMOVERS explores the best of the best of earthmoving machinery, offering great stories, fascinating facts and some surprising conclusions. Follow our team of experts as they examine the biggest and most powerful super-dozers, excavators and dumptrucks - some the size of office buildings - to reveal the worlds greatest marvels of excavation engineering.

title: Ekati Diamond Mine
overview: In Canada's Northwest Territories, monster machines are moving mountains of gem-studded earth at the Ekati Diamond Mine. Here, in the brutal sub-Arctic, you'll meet a trio of the world's most hardcore mining machines.

title: Guns: Machines of War
overview: NGC explores the 150-year history and evolution of the machine gun from the 19th-century Gatling gun to the first gangster "hit" with a Tommy Gun to one of the deadliest weapons in the world.

title: Hawaii Super Ferry
overview: Construction is under way on the Hawaii Super Ferry - a commuter vessel complete with shops, restaurants and enough storage space for nearly 300 cars. Join NGC to find out how this super ferry will soon provide fast and affordable ferry service in Hawaii. But to succeed, it must provide a comfortable ride while blazing at speeds of almost 50 mph and cutting through 6-foot-high swells. Follow a team of workers as they attempt to convert the innovative design into a functional ferry.

title: Hoover Dam Reinvented
overview: Hoover Dam is regarded as an engineering masterpiece and an America icon. But what if it did not exist today? How would engineers build it today? In this one hour program, we ask a team of engineers what they would do the same and what they would do differently... as we re-invent Hoover Dam.

title: Impossible Bridges: Denmark to Sweden
overview: The longest bridge of its kind, the Oresund connects Denmark and Sweden for the first time since the Ice Age. Discover the extreme equipment, massive parts and innovative design it took to create the link that radically altered the map of Scandinavia.

title: Impossible Bridges: Golden Gate
overview: See how designers and engineers overcame the near impossible to build this bridge -- one of the longest in the world -- in one of the most challenging environments on earth

title: Impossible Hotel
overview: Off the coast of Dubai, the world's tallest and most luxurious hotel rises from the water like a massive yacht. NGC takes you inside the conception and construction of this audacious structure that pushed the boundaries of engineering to the limit.

title: Impossible Islands
overview: In the Arabian Gulf, the world's largest artificial islands are being constructed in the shape of a massive palm tree. It's part of a plan to transform Dubai into the world's premier luxury tourist destination. Will it work?

title: Impossible Moves: Colossal Churches
overview: In Manning, Iowa, building movers haul a Lutheran church with a 100-foot steeple to a new location. In Sarasota, Florida, movers dismantle the iconic Crocker Church for a move through crammed downtown streets.

title: Impossible Moves: Machines
overview: Two teams of movers overcome massive logistical obstacles to move two Massive Machines. In England we follow the exploits of heavy hauler Alf Arnold who faces the unenviable task of moving $40 million worth of brand new subway cars 200 miles across the UKs roads for Londons Underground. Once they reach the city, he has to thread each of the eighteen carriages down through a narrow hole in the road in the correct order and line them up on the track below. Can Alfs team deliver the pristine trains onto the tracks in 24 hours, and without a single scratch? In Manitoba, Canada, we chart the emotional journey of husband and wife wreck chasers Pat Madden and Annette Spaulding as they attempt to lift a long lost aircraft off the bottom of a Lake. Can the team haul the aircraft out of the water before winter strikes?

title: Impossible Moves: Towns
overview: Two teams of building movers face the ultimate challenge : move two Entire Towns of homes. On Vancouver Island, Canada, a team of engineers attempts to build and move a series of floating luxury homes. But can they haul the 85-ton aquatic villas through 150 miles of rough waters, from the construction site to their moorings, without sailing off course? While in Denver, Colorado we reveal how a team of leading skyscraper designers is turning vertical construction methods horizontal to build, move and assemble an entire town of homes in record time. Will David Cohen's radical ideas transform the way communities are created in the future?

title: Incredible Islands: Dubai
overview: Dubai is taking nature into its own hands by creating 300 man-made islands off its coast in its attempt to become the top tourist destination in the world. Its goal: to develop these islands into what can be seen from space as a world map.

title: Miami Hotel
overview: A family demolition team from Phoenix Maryland descends on Miami Beach, Florida to take down an outdated resort complex. Neighboring multi-million dollar condo buildings sit just 18 feet away. The team has limited time to load and rig dynamite and highly specialized, high speed explosives capable of cutting steel. They struggle to keep every ounce of explosive energy from impacting the buildings and people that surround the demolition site.

title: Nuclear Plant
overview: A family demolition team from Phoenix, Maryland descends on site of the Sellafield Nuclear plant to take down four outdated nuclear cooling towers. The demolition team plans on making history by being the first to successfully use explosives on an active nuclear site in the United Kingdom. The team has ten days to load and rig 4400 dynamite charges in the towers, one of which is only 40m away from a nuclear fuel processing plant. The team is set to make history, but are worried about the fallout.

title: Orange Bowl
overview: The Orange Bowl home to the Miami Dolphins for 21 seasons, and host of five Super Bowls is about to be demolished. Its a monster breakdown jobwith a monster deadline: In just four months, a demolition team needs to clear over a quarter million feet of stadium to get ready for a new stadium. Not only is there a tight timetable, everything must be salvaged or recycled. But before the team can break down the stadium, theyll have to save parts of it. After a memorabilia company combs the bowl for collectibles and auctions off what they salvage its finally time for the demo team to get their hands on the bowl. 50,000 left over orange seats, nearly 100,000 square feet of turf, and eight ten-ton stadium light towers are recycled or resold, freeing the demo team to take down the stadium itself. Using a combo of wrecking balls and mega machines, theyll cut, pull, and pummel this historic structure until its a bowl full of rubble. The iconic Orange Bowl, is about to be history.

title: Panama Canal Unlocked
overview: Built in 1914, the world's shipping shortcut, the Panama Canal, is having trouble keeping up with 21st century demand. A $5 billion expansion is about to change that.

title: Plane
overview: The 747 Jumbo is a marvel of engineering that revolutionized world travel. Nearly forty years after the first flight it continues to be the worlds fastest subsonic jetliner . Now the bigger challenge isn't the construction of new aircraft, its the dismantling of the old. With pieces that are all substantially bigger, higher and heavier than standard jets, the 747 promises to be a tough deconstruction challenge for this group of airplane mechanics. Well be with them, from cockpit to cargo hold, as they tackle this mega feat of unengineering.

title: Power Diggers of Iceland
overview: In Iceland, a giant boring machine called Jaws is tunneling through miles of basalt, one of the world's hardest rocks. The tunnel is the linchpin of a massive hydro-electric plant that will use glacier melt water to make electricity.

title: Power Quest
overview: The global energy crisis is fueling innovation at rapid speeds, and in Power Quest we'll traverse the continent in search of the latest in alternative energy sources.

title: Power Towers
overview: Along the shores of the Persian Gulf sits a building with two 50-story glass towers shaped like sails, Bahrain World Trade Center. Explore the worlds first skyscraper to incorporate wind energy on a large scale.

title: Rocket Tower
overview: A family demolition team from Phoenix Maryland descends on Cape Canaveral, Florida to take down an obsolete rocket launch tower. The team has one month to load and rig highly specialized, high-speed explosives capable of cutting steel. They struggle to keep the job on schedule and the team safe on this industrial demolition site.

title: Secret History of the Bra
overview: Science meets fashion when NGC travels the world to reveal the secrets, history and complex construction behind one of the world's most highly engineered garments.

title: Shanghai SuperTower
overview: With 101 floors, the Shanghai World Financial Center is China's tallest structure, engineered to withstand the toughest environmental challenges -- and even deadlier human threats.

title: Shrink-Wrapped & Boxed Up
overview: Since the ancient Greeks and Romans started storing wine in ceramic vases, packaging has evolved to withstand plane crashes, outwit shoplifters, and reduce landfill trash. Packaging made from corn and rice may point the way to a cleaner future.

title: Snack Attack
overview: What's the key ingredient in potato chips? How many Goldfish to a bag? Learn the secrets of America's favorite snack foods.

title: The Forensic Lab
overview: As NGC explores the time-consuming reality of real life CSI, we see there is no perfect crime. Go behind the scenes of working forensic labs to see the true scientific processes need to turn the smallest clues into hard evidence.

title: Tokyo: Living Small in the Big City
overview: Explore Tokyo - the worlds most populous metropolis. This place has it all, except the space for its 35 million residents. Architects must answer the challenge with an array of inventive solutions for living small in a big city. Visitors and residents sleep in hotel rooms the size of phone booths and use inventive floor and light plans to turn the small into the spacious. See how Tokyo overcomes the space crunch while staying comfortable and maintaining the citys distinct style.

title: Twin City Bridge: After the Collapse
overview: In little over a year, an astonishing new bridge is designed and built to replace the I-35W bridge over the Mississippi River that tragically collapsed in Minneapolis, Minnesota.

title: Ultimate Cruise Ship
overview: Freedom of the Seas debuted in 2006 as the worlds largest cruise ship: a fast, fabulous floating city with nearly 6000 people on board almost every day. Freedom has a reputation for everything thats bold and beautiful, and her first New Year's is set to be an extravagant celebration with a week of intense preparation leading up to the biggest ever New Year's Eve party at sea. She is equipped with the technology to handle almost anything: rogue waves, hurricanes, terrorist attack and even contagious diseases - threats no captain can ignore. In the lead up to the big bash, Freedom and her crew of nearly 1500 will not only battle the elements but also a full complement of eccentric guests. The first New Years Eve on the worlds biggest cruise ship: plain sailing or a nautical nightmare? This is the inside story.

title: USS Ronald Reagan
overview: Experience the rush of a fighter jet launch from the world's most advanced nuclear-powered aircraft carrier and discover the inner workings of this floating American territory.

title: Vegas Casino
overview: A family demolition team from Phoenix Maryland descends on Vegas to take down the legendary New Frontier Hotel and Casino complex.They've imploded 20 structures in Vegas but the Frontier proves to be particularly difficult. Its a stubborn old building, filled with massive amounts of rebar, that forces the team to load over 5000 sticks of dynamite. Further complicating the plan, the client wants to send the building out with a huge fireworks display. Loaded with dynamite, fireworks and steel, the Frontier impresses to the last.

title: World's Biggest Casino
overview: Follow the construction of the world's biggest casino and its second biggest building. It's being sited in Macau, in Southern China, which is being groomed to be Asia's capital of gambling.

title: World's Largest Cruise Ship
overview: The Oasis of the Sea is the largest and most revolutionary cruise ship in the world. Apart from sheer size - with 18 decks, 2,700 staterooms and the ability to carry 5,400 guests - the ship is a high-tech vessel for the 21st century, presenting features that have never been seen on a ship before. To build it, designers and engineers are put to the ultimate test.

title: Aqua Power
overview: Three teams of engineers are locked in a race to harness what may be the most powerful form of green energy swift tidal currents and battering waves, the power of the oceans. Each team believes it can solve a portion of the worlds energy needs. They're testing out three different machines designed to be placed in the water and convert ocean energy into electricity. But getting the machine from the design stage to implementation has been a difficult challenge and now each team is ready to install their systems and turn them on for the first time. If they succeed, they could radically change the way we power our planet.

title: Circular Skyscraper
overview: Abu Dhabi will set out on the biggest project to date - a new micro-city with a round skyscraper taller than the Statue of Liberty and curved glass skin covering the area of four football fields. The spherical design and the proposed site pose numerous challenges, including design stability and a location that is half a mile out in the Persian Gulf and 25 feet under water. On top of everything, this skyscraper must be completed in just 30 montmonths' time.

title: Bugatti Super Car
overview: The Bugatti Veyron is a "super" super car - part automobile and part airplane. And with a base price of $1,750,000, it is the most expensive production car in the world. Designed with materials and construction techniques normally found in the aerospace industry, this remarkable engineering achievement is one of the fastest street-legal cars ever built. Now, NGC takes an insider look at the Bugatti factory to see how this modern engineering masterpiece is built.

title: Grand Canyon Skywalk
overview: Get exclusive access to the construction of a man-made marvel suspended over one of Mother Nature's greatest wonders a horseshoe-shaped, glass-floored bridge that allows visitors to walk where eagles fly. NGC takes viewers behind the daring design and death-defying construction of the Grand Canyon Skywalk, formed from 1 million pounds of steel and glass, perched 4,000 feet above the Colorado River.

title: A Closer Shave
overview: Could our modern Western preference for smooth mates have its origins in prehistoric dating? From sharpened rocks to the multi-blade razor, the story of shaving gets especially rough with the intense rivalry between inventors Gillette and Schick.

title: Aircrane: Extreme Helicopter
overview: Stacking five ton sections of steel, fourteen hundred feet in the air - plucking fourteen thousand pound logs off of mountain slopes - blasting wildfires with twenty-five hundred gallons of water - all with one machine! It can only be the Air-Crane! Six blades and nine thousand horsepower under the control of fearless, expert pilots do the seemingly impossible day after death defying day. From Nevada to Sardinia to Vancouver Island, see this Extreme Helicopter in stunning High Def as it pushes the boundaries of flight.

title: Amphicar
overview: The Amphicar, a German-built novelty, is not only a car; it's also a boat. Hampered by extensive repairs and hard-to-find parts, classic car expert Alan Lewenthal and his restoration crew transform a rare 1967 amphibious car from a rusty relic into a profitable auction-block winner. The restoration turns out to be twice the trouble as the crew finds their auto repair skills sorely tested when it comes to fixing a boat.

title: Camaro
overview: To resurrect a classic 1969 Chevrolet Camaro z28, restoration wizard Alan Lewenthal and his crew persist against the devastating effects of massive corrosion and the difficulties of finding authentic engine parts to restore this rare muscle car. They have just 12 weeks to complete the rebuild for a prestigious auto auction in Atlantic City where Alan hopes to sell the classic for a profit. Alan bought the Camaro sight unseen but information found on the z28s body tag made the rusty relic an irresistibly valuable restoration prospect. Along w/the standard designations for interior style and engine size, the tag indicated the former street racer had come from the GM factory with a custom color paint job. This z28 was a one-of-a-kindrare among the rare. Using auto-archaeology to find the original paint color and spending more than $100,000 in parts and labor, Alan raises this legendary muscle car from a rust heap to its former glory only to take a 40 thousand dollar loss at the Atlantic City auction. But he says, its all in the game.

title: Caterpillar
overview: The Caterpillar 797B is so large that assembly takes place at six different locations. Tour all of the factories that build this mining Goliath.

title: Chevy Volt
overview: The soon-to-be-released Chevy Volt electric car just might redefine the automotive world: It can go from 0 to 60 in less than nine seconds, hit a top speed of 100 miles per hour and is good for 40 miles of zero-emission, pure electric driving. Our cameras got rare behind-the-scenes access to the pre-production factory for this revolutionary vehicle

title: Crash Lab
overview: See engineers "bake" dummies that are life-like enough to feel crash impacts as human bodies would. Then head to meet the world record holder for the "most human subject crash tests," who has willingly subjected his body to 852 real-life accidents

title: Flushed
overview: Find out how people through the ages have taken care of their private business, from sociable Romans, to buttoned-up Victorians, to astronauts answering nature's call in zero gravity. See how the toilet of the future may help the world's water shortage.

title: Gallon of Gas
overview: Gallon of Gas is a program that explores the journey of oil - from creation millions of years ago...all the way to your car's gas tank. Starting as prehistoric plankton, transforming in the pressure cooker of time, and finally emerging as the raw stuff which fuels the modern world. To win this elusive prize, well drill through miles of rock. And brave some of the harshest locations on the planet. All simply to fill our tanks

title: Alaska's Extreme Machines
overview: Alaskas Extreme Machines is a spine-jarring, jaw-dropping road trip aboard three the nations biggest and most powerful machines as their tough crews battle the extreme elements during an Alaska winter to accomplish their missions.

title: Hi-Tech War on Terror
overview: Get a behind-the-scenes look at some of the cutting-edge technologies being developed by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security to detect, deter, and defeat terrorist attacks against U.S. citizens and infrastructure within our borders.

title: Leaning Skyscraper
overview: Abu Dhabi is famous for its extreme engineering, but now one project could surpass them all - the world's most inclined skyscraper, Capital Gate. Capital Gate is a tower that spirals out of the ground at 525 feet and tilts almost five times more than the Leaning Tower of Pisa. The tower will include a five-star hotel on the top 18 levels, an infinity pool, a restaurant hanging 300 feet above the ground and a helicopter pad on the roof.

title: Crash Lab
overview: In high-tech crash labs, scientists use stunt drivers and crash-test dummies to test vehicle impact from all angles.

title: Bridges of NYC
overview: Follow construction of the Brooklyn Bridge, NYC's first suspension bridge; the George Washington Bridge, the world's busiest bridge; and the Verrazano Narrows, NYC's longest bridge.

title: Statement Of Fact
overview: Chris Dale is the chief trial deputy for the district attorney. He is a sharp-tongued, egocentric man who is dominating and abusive to his wife. He learns that Ellen Randle Dudley, accused of murdering her husband with an ax, has been captured in the town of Evanston--which is outside of his jurisdiction. Dale promptly travels to Evanston, rides rough-shod over the local sheriff, and settles down to an intense, grueling interrogation of the woman. It becomes clear that the woman's relationship to her husband mirrored Dale's own marriage. As he comes to realize this, Dale is both repulsed by and attracted to the woman.

title: All The Comforts Of Home
overview: Southern banjo player Luke Stringer had headed to New York to find fame and fortune. He returns to his sister's farm, sad, defeated, and with just twelve dollars in his pocket. Hoping to put the pieces of his life back together, he meets up with the town's recluse and her blind daughter. The woman, Ruthie, is known as "the snake lady" because she makes and sells snakeskin articles. Luke takes a liking to her and begins teaching her daughter to play the banjo.

title: Wall to War War
overview: The employees of an insurance company located on the nineteenth floor of a Philadelphia office building are anticipating the upcoming weekend as Friday afternoon approaches. Cal Brown, a Korean War veteran, suddenly pulls a gun and announces to his co-workers that they are going to take Hill 902. He begins to train his "platoon", and, as the evening progresses, they come to understand the horrors of war.

title: Where Do You Hide An Egg?
overview: Three dim-witted guys decide to rob the corner saloon while the owner is away. What they don't know is that saloon is owned by the Mafia

title: The Stranger
overview: At night, on a coastal road, a boy is nearly hit by a car. The car's passengers, stopping to see if the boy is all right, are disturbed by his strange behavior.

title: Sorofino's Treasure
overview: A young Mexican fisherman uses a pearl he found to pay off his debts at the local store. But his wife, who thinks the pearl is worth much more, wants it back.

title: Vote No on 11!
overview: When aged Jessie McCoony allowed a photographer to take her picture for 50 dollars, she didn't know that it would be used on a poster asking citizens to vote down a slum-clearance bill that Jessie and her neighbors definitely favor. Young Daphne is also affected by the poster: she's afraid that she'll be a mirror-image of the pitiful old woman if she doesn't escape the slums soon.

title: The Fling
overview: Story of a poor couple living the desert south west. The woman is crippled and although he loves her very much, he is tempted into cheating on her.

title: Captain Al Sanchez
overview: Capt. Al comes to Mexico from California each month, spending money like water. He meets a poor Mexican girl named Dolores who begs him to take her back with him. But Al has a secret which he must keep from her.

title: Don't Call Me Dirty Names
overview: Wealthy Tom Graham arrives home from work and is informed by his wife that their younger daughter Terry, at college in San Francisco, has just called home to say that she is pregnant by one of her professors. Terry, who is very impetuous, is contemplating an abortion--or suicide. Graham rushes to San Francisco to try and cope with the situation.

title: Big Mitch
overview: Big Mitch lives in a dream world that begins to collapse when his daughter announces her plans to marry.

title: Which Are the Nuts? Which Are the Bolts?
overview: Ex-boxer Joey Briggs has been in an institution for three years, being treated for drug and alcohol abuse and emotional trauma. His psychiatrist now feels he is ready to re-enter society. As he takes a train journey to an unspecified destination, he contemplates his past through mental flashbacks and conversations with a friendly porter, and tries to come to terms with himself. A young blind girl he meets on the train may help him.

title: Where's The Million Dollars?
overview: Peter Zandocus was sent to jail for three years for tax evasion, but will get out a year early for good behavior. He will be released in a week. Sidney Hagen of the IRS, fraud division, is convinced that Zandocus stashed away a million dollars before going to jail. He sends a special agent, Ray March, to cozy up to Norma Jean Fryburger, the girl who testified on Zandocus' behalf and who Hagen believes is holding the money out of fear for her life.

title: The Mafia Man
overview: An exiled member of the Mafia promises to testify before a crime hearing, if the U.S. government will escort him safely to this country for a brief visit with his son.

title: The Hooligan
overview: Rancher Steve Gregg, broke and about to lose his ranch, comes to town looking for the saloon owner who owes him a thousand dollars. McBride, the saloon owner, claims that all his money is tied up in inventory, whereupon Gregg proceeds to destroy some of said inventory, the saloon, and a few bouncers, before being knocked out with a mallet. Gregg then calls on Maurice Holden, who also owes him money, only to find his widow, who doesn't care to discuss finances at the moment, and orders Gregg thrown off her ranch. Gregg and the feisty Widow Holden shout, insult, threaten...and fall in love.

title: Welcome Home, Dan
overview: Famous foreign correspondent Dan Wilson arrives at his home town, to be met by the mayor, his mother, and a glamorous girlfriend from his past, Min Adams. Once at home, it's learned through his mother's probing that Wilson has, at most, a year to live.

title: First Sermon
overview: Father Leonard Winger is nervously preparing for his first sermon, concerned that he does not know "how to touch a human heart". As he rehearses, he receives a frantic call for a priest. He finds a young man, who thinks that he has killed his unfaithful girlfriend at a masquerade party. Father Leonard locates the party and finds the girl unconscious in a back room; she dies at the hospital. Detective Sergeant Prouser investigates, knowing that Father Leonard knows what happened, but is holding to the sanctity of the confessional.

title: Death Before Dishonor
overview: Mrs. Chaney come to the home of Betty Haste, whose husband is out of town. Mrs. Chaney tells Betty she is is in danger. Betty allows her to come in......a terrible mistake.

title: A Tough Man To Kill
overview: Intelligent, cultured Henry Fell Shannon is a "bodyguard extraordinaire" who is for hire to prevent assassinations or take on other humanitarian tasks. A New York editor assigns his associate society editor, Peggy Harriman, to get a "true adventure feature" on Shannon. Meanwhile, a "trigger boy" from the 1940's, Joey Wilson, is getting out of jail after twenty years, and the syndicate wants him dead for ratting on some key men during his stay in prison. To get her story, Harriman poses as a friend of Wilson's, and hires Shannon to get Wilson safely to Mexico and an anonymous existence.

title: Occupational Hazard
overview: Wealthy William and Margareta Krespie are being blackmailed by George Masters Sherman. Sherman knows that, years ago, Krespie killed one of his employees when he threatened to expose Krespie's illegal business practices. The Krespies hire a suave, cold-blooded hit man, Carl Bannister, to get rid of their blackmailer. Bannister becomes attracted to the Krespies' shy daughter Dorcas, much to the alarm of Rosa, the Krespies' cook, who is a devoted protector of Dorcas.

title: The Arena: Part 1
overview: District Attorney Joseph Campbell is running for United States senator. His major opponent is Maggie Clements, widow of a popular senator who is being backed by her influential father-in-law. The nominating convention is being held in Campbell's city at the same time that he is dealing with a tricky prosecution. Jeanette Brown, who is under eighteen, is being held on a murder charge and the decision must be made whether to try her as an adult or a juvenile. Campbell asks the judge for a continuance so that he can seek the nomination without the trial being a factor, but the judge refuses. Part one ends with the convention in a deadlock on the sixth ballot.

title: The Arena: Part 2
overview: With the convention still deadlocked, Maggie Clements offers to withdraw from the race if Campbell promises to prosecute Jeanette Brown as an adult. This would also gain Campbell favor with a powerful newspaper tycoon who will promise his support. Campbell refuses and addresses the convention in a climactic speech.

title: All the Blood Of Yesterday
overview: An American, Carl, and a Frenchman, Paul, who served together during World War II meet again in Paris. Paul is in trouble and needs Carl's help.

title: A Need Of Valor
overview: A narcotics addict, desperately in need of a fix, holds a young woman hostage while he vainly tries to steal enough money to buy drugs.

title: The Pilot Episode
overview: Nate is set up to go on a blind date with Susan, only when he goes to pick her up, he picks up Marni, who was set to go on a different blind date. After talking through dinner, they realize they are perfect for each other, but also realize that they are on the wrong dates.

title: The Return of Todd Episode
overview: To make it up to Marni for throwing Todd out on their first date, Nate decides he will spend a day hanging out with Todd. However, Nate doesn't really want to hang out with him. Nate makes up excuses to avoid Todd, but Marni ruins his plans. Todd joins in on a basketball game that Nate and Bowie are playing. Todd continuously harasses Nate, causing Nate to bring out his true feelings about Todd.

title: The Apartment Episode
overview: Marni has never seen Nate's apartment, so she invites herself over one night. However, Nate is embarrased to have Marni see the clutter in his apartment, so he makes excuses to keep her away. Tess tells Marni to break in to see it while Nate is at work, only they get more than they bargained for when they do.

title: The Tea Episode
overview: Nate decides that he wants to become closer to Marni, so he brings a cup of her favourite tea to the hospital where she works. When he gets there he is surprised to find that Marni has another boyfriend, albeit an imaginary one.

title: The Morning After
overview: Nate spends the night at Marni's for the first time, and they decide to have a picnic the next day. The only trouble is Marni's father, who abandoned her, causes some problems on the way to their picnic.

title: The Birthday Episode
overview: On the night before, Marni informs Nate that the next day is her birthday. Nate goes out scrambling for the perfect gift, but is always outdone by Todd. When Nate finally has the perfect gift, he can not give it to Marni because they keep getting interrupted. But when he finally does, it brings the two closer together.

title: The Snap Out Of It Episode
overview: Marni is up for a promotion at work, but when she doesn't get the job, she falls into a depression. Nate tries everything he can think of to snap her out of it, including seeing what he thinks is a therapist for advice.

title: The Snow Episode
overview: Marni and Nate have a really bad day, so they decide to lock themselves inside Marni's apartment to disconnect from the world. Only it is difficult to stay disconnected for Marni when it starts snowing.

title: The Mother Episode
overview: Nate takes Marni to meet his mother, who is residing in an asylum. The only problem is his mother doesn't like Marni, and Marni is desperate for her approval.

title: The Statue Guy Episode
overview: Nate faces his fears when he attends the funeral of Fred the Statue Guy, but accidentally takes communion even though he is Jewish. Elsewhere, Marni introduces Tess to her hairstylist, who when washing Marni's hair, causes Marni to have ""hairgasms"".

title: The Burger Episode
overview: Nate loses a bet to Bowie, and must buy him a $29 hamburger. Just as they are about to leave, they run into Marni, who invites herself out with them. Nate needs to go get cash from the ATM, only he runs into trouble with a homeless man he tries to help. All of this delays Bowie from his hamburger, which he fasted for 24 hours to have.

title: The Perfect Person Episode (1)
overview: Todd, in an attempt to break up Nate & Marni, sets Nate up by getting him drunk, and placing him in bed with the person he has a lot in common with.

title: The Perfect Person Episode (2)
overview: Nate wakes up in Natalie's bed, and quickly gets out of there. He later tells Marni, and about a kiss shared between Nate & Natalie. Marni decides she needs to kiss a guy to be even, which leads to Nate and Marni "breaking up". However, Marni is reluctant to give up, and chases Nate down, who says his speech was only to say he is sick of Marni's behavior, and that they will be together forever.

title: Episode 1
overview: MO NGA-LIK, ALEX, product designer of the Research & Development Department of Goaltech Scientific Ltd., is not only talented but also very popular among his colleagues and boss. His four proteges, who are known as A4, even regard him as their good friends. His girlfriend, LING LING-CHING, works for an NGO. MO KIN-YEE, KIN, ALEX’s younger sister, works at an insurance company. An aggressive member of the “post-80s” generation, her dream is to buy a flat of her own. CHI WING-HAN, VIOLET, manager of the Administration Department, is picking the receptionist up the second ALEX walks into the office. He decides to teach VIOLET a lesson. Senior Marketing Officer MAN KA-WA, STEVE, went to the same secondary school as ALEX. He has worked at Goaltech for 10 years. STEVE has a difficult time being teased about when he is meeting a client with his boss……

title: Episode 2
overview: VIOLET calls her secretary, HOI-KEI, telling her to tell STEVE to come to see her. He does not know until he runs into ALEX that VIOLET wants to see both of them. According to her, their promotion proposals have been shelved. ALEX, STEVE and A4 plan to complain to SAM. ELAINE, the departmental secretary, has managed to find out about which hospital SAM’s wife, CHAN OI-LIN, IRENE, is staying. Taking her advice, ALEX and STEVE make a dash for the hospital but they do not see SAM. VIOLET has hired a private nurse for IRENE. It turns out that the nurse, whose name is WONG SHUI-SHUI, is not only her cousin but also her mole. VIOLET is not happy that STEVE’s new car is more expensive than hers. DICKSON requests that KIN ask NING-CHING to work for him after learning that the latter is a friend of socialite MRS. SZEMA’s. If KIN fails to do so, he threatens, she will be given the axe……

title: Episode 3
overview: A MR. DIU, who STEVE suspects is a homosexual, wants to rent a room. STEVE does not think he will make a good tenant, but for money’s sake he has no choice. STEVE is molested by a homosexual at a convenience store. And then a man with a moustache follows him. It turns out that the man is INDERPAL SINGH, STEVE’s Indian school friend who was born in Hong Kong. Some twenty years ago INDERPAL returned to India as per his parents’ request but he has come back to look for a job. STEVE puts him up for the time being. DICKSON makes things difficult for KIN again. YIU YEE-LONG, AARON, a member of A4, helps her out. KIN wants to resign. When NING-CHING learns that DICKSON has been menacing KIN, she agrees to join her insurance company. SAM tells ALEX to call on his flat in the evening to report the progress of a product research. ALEX knows that this will be a good timing to complain against VIOLET. MRS……

title: Episode 4
overview: VIOLET, after being informed by her mole, sneaks into SAM’s study to seduce him. ALEX is taken in instantly. SAM plans to invite GILBERT CHAN, a well-known marketing people, to be the Marketing Director of Goaltech. VIOLET, who is assigned to take care of the invitation, turns to FRANCIS, Manager of the Finance Department, for advice of how to ruin the plan. CHAN CHING-LOY, IRENE’s father who lives in Thailand, has come to see IRENE. He treats SAM very badly and even hits him. No matter how badly he is treated, SAM dares not say a word. His father-in-law’s attitude towards him reminds him of how IRENE used to treat him. The idea of becoming MRS. KO comes to VIOLET’s mind when SHUI-SHUI tells her SAM does not want to see her wife wake up. INDERPAL sees through DICKSON’s crafty scheme and decides to expose his mask. NING-CHING sees DICKSON bribing INDERPAL.

title: Episode 5
overview: KIN and ARRON get along very well. She likes him even more when she learns that he is her favorite blogger “MR. GET AHEAD”. STEVE is thrilled when KIMURA’s assistant calls to fix a time for them to sign the contract on Friday evening. ALEX and his colleagues all think that they should keep the matter a secret. VIOLET demands ALEX to submit a sample product that uses nano anion far infrared synthetic technology but he pays no attention to her. A friend of INDERPAL’s sells second-hand electrical appliances to India for a living. Seeing this, INDERPAL hawks the used electrical appliances he gets from ALEX’s flat. NING-CHING is upset when she learns that he has sold ALEX’s weather forecast instrument as well. SAM runs into ALEX. VIOLET grasps the opportunity to mention the nano anion far infrared synthetic technology. As a result, SAM tells ALEX to explain the technology to him in detail the day after tomorrow……

title: Episode 6
overview: ALEX and STEVE have both received a warning letter. If VIOLET ever picks at him again, ALEX declares, he will quit for sure. STEVE believes VIOLET has planted a mole in the company. STEVE’s flat is stuffed with used electrical appliances which INDERPAL took home. INDERPAL nearly sets the house on fire as he is fixing an oven. DIU has a heart attack because of the false alarm, and he decides to move out as soon as he has been discharged. KIN and her friend CHOW LEI-LEI go to a job fair together. She is hugely dejected that she does not get an offer. VIOLET suggests reducing staff but SAM does not find it a good idea. She wants to express her love for him but the sudden appearance of IRENE’s younger brother, CHAN SHUN-MO, ruins her plan. SAM is going to Germany on a business trip. He decides not to take ALEX along this time. SHUM HEI-MAN takes INDERPAL for STEVE’s driver……

title: Episode 7
overview: LING-CHING cannot believe she is employed. She wants to tell VIOLET that ALEX is her boyfriend but VIOLET must dash for the airport. KIN goes to a real estate agency to look for a flat. She recommends herself to the manager, HO CHING-CHIK, as soon as she learns that they are hiring people. CHING-CHIK tells her to get a certificate of registration for real estate agent first. STEVE’s mobile phone is running out of battery. Inspired by LING-CHING’s casual remarks, he comes up with a special charger that can charge up any battery. KIN asks AARON on the Internet for interview tips. His reply is “compliance”, which works. SAM asks ALEX about the progress of the research and development of far infrared products. ALEX tells his boss he is currently working on a product named “ES”. SAM therefore tells him to go all-out to work on the new project. STEVE would like to invite HEI-MAN to their wedding……

title: Episode 8
overview: HEI-MAN’s appearance at ALEX’s wedding makes STEVE believe he will become her boyfriend. To his disappointment, she is only attending the wedding on behalf of her boyfriend, DR. SHING KA-YAN. SAM announces that a Germany is interested in Goaltech’s products and that its owner will be coming to Hong Kong. LING-CHING decides to postpone their honeymoon so that ALEX will be able to meet the German client. ALEX appreciates her thoughtfulness. VIOLET has returned from overseas. SAM gives her a ride to the office. Everybody in the company jumps to the conclusion that she is SAM’s mistress. STEVE’s car is missing. He suspects that it must have been stolen. It turns out that INDERPAL is using it for his illegal car hire business. VIOLET is unfamiliar with ES products. SAM therefore decides she needs not meet the German client. She, however, decides to turn up at the meeting anyway……

title: Episode 9
overview: ALEX and LING-CHING are surprised to learn upon their return that VIOLET is taking a three-month’s leave and that SAM is taking care of her responsibilities. On the other hand, SAM hopes that LING-CHING can take charge of the Marketing Department for the time being. VIOLET tells SHUI-SHUI to keep a close eye at what happens in SAM’s flat. KIN and CHING-CHIK go to a new residential property to look for business. KIN dashes out to the road to stop an incoming vehicle by force so as to secure a business. CHING-CHIK disapproves of her unorthodox way of making a sale. KIN runs into AARON at lunch. Once again, he leaves a very good impression on her. LEI-LEI borrows AARON’s phone with the excuse of having left her phone at home, her intention in fact is to find out about his number. SAM has forgiven VIOLET. She will resume her post of Administration Department Manager after her recovery……

title: Episode 10
overview: ALEX receives a call from STEVE at 6 o’clock in the morning telling him to go to Shum Shui Po, where he and INDERPAL have recently opened a juice shop. KIN dashes out to the road again to try to get a business but CHING-CHIK stops her. Quoting sources as saying that major developers in town are going to acquire dilapidated premises in To Kwan Wan, CHUN, who is the boss of KIN and CHING-CHIK, requests his agents to try to acquire as many flats in To Kwan Wan as possible. SAM is out of town. ALEX plans to apply for a few days’ leave but LING-CHING hands him an ES project progress form, telling him to speed up the research and develop progress. An old woman is selling her flat at a very low price. CHING-CHIK finds that it is indeed a haunted apartment, but KIN believes it is now or never. AARON is interested in KIN’s investment plan. He borrows money from a finance company so as to take part in the plan……

title: Episode 11
overview: Business of the juice shop has been quiet. STEVE meets INDERPAL’s cousin RAJA when he is distributing fliers. According to RAJA, INDERPAL had promised his mother that he would work at RAJA’s company before he returned to Hong Kong. That’s why he is working for him now. The girl who works at the juice shop is called JUICE. Her boyfriend, BROTHER SMILING, has borrows a knife from the shop. The knife is covered with bloodstains when he returns it to the shop. STEVE and INDERPAL are almost involved in a lawsuit because of this. LING-CHING has discovered the tracking device. She changes her position so as to keep a closed eye at ALEX. Taking LAU TSUN-TUNG’s advice, STEVE treats new recruit SIS FONG very badly. On the other hand, with a view to cutting down operational cost, he takes Goaltech’s stationery for the private use of the juice shop. STEVE’s recent disinclination to work arouses LING-CHING’s suspicion……

title: Episode 12
overview: The babies on the TV catch LING-CHING’s eyeballs. ALEX takes the opportunity to ask whether she would like to have a baby of her own. He is thrilled to bits to see her typing a resignation letter. But when she tells him what will come with the birth of a baby, he decides to give up the idea. LING-CHING tells RYAN to stalk STEVE. It takes STEVE quite an effort to get rid of him. When he finally arrives at the juice shop, he discovers that SIS FONG has stolen many fruits from the shop. KIN learns by chance that GRANNY WONG is CHUN’s auntie and that they have conspired together to coax her into buying the haunted apartment. SHUI-SHUI sees VIOLET, who has just resumed work, typing a resignation letter. VIOLET explains that is because she does not see any prospect in the company. She drops the idea of quitting the next day when KAR PO-PING, one of the shareholders of Goaltech, shows up……

title: Episode 13
overview: Great aunt’s 90th birthday is round the corner. ALEX plans to buy her a gold peach but KIN, who cannot even make ends meet, cannot afford it. He blames her for not telling him that she is going out with AARON. STEVE is very upset to hear that he will not be promoted. LING-CHING cheers him up, telling him the position of marketing manager is not taken yet. RAJA’s company is like a prison to INDERPAL. STEVE tries to help him out but to no avail. KIN is short of money. Her colleague suggests that she borrow money from CHING-CHIK. TSUN-TUNG’s mistress is pregnant. She calls on him suddenly. As a result, LAI leaves in anger taking their son away. STEVE has wound up the juice shop. It comes as a blow to him when upon his arrival at the company, when WILLIAM announces that GILBERT CHAN will take up the position of marketing manager. VIOLET gets hold of the financial situation of Goaltech with the help of KAN SZE-SZE……

title: Episode 14
overview: KIN learns by chance that AARON has cheated her for many times. She suspects it was a pack of lies that he borrowed money with a view to helping his family members. STEVE has bought GILBERT a pot of orchid the first day he reports duties, only to be told that he is toadying the wrong person. LAI discovers that the bills have not been settled, neither have the staff been paid. In a letter TSUN-TUNG has left, he tells her she can do whatever she likes with the restaurant. SHUI-SHUI informs VIOLET that WILLIAM wants IRENE to go for a brain surgery. As such, he would like her to continue taking care of his wife. KIN hopes that AARON can help her out with the decoration of her new house. She leaves in anger when he turns her down with another make-up excuse. ALEX can see that KIN is upset about AARON. Pouring her heart out, she insists that it is not her fault but AARON’s. VIOLET tries to access to the company’s confidential date……

title: Episode 15
overview: LAI is negotiating with MRS. CHIU, her landlord, when TSUN-TUNG appears suddenly and demands to take their son away. INDERPAL stops him with a trick. As a result, he is late for work and given a telling-off by RAJA. This time, he asks LAI to help him out. STEVE learns from the nurses that a couple, both of whom are doctors, have recently broken up. Mistakenly believes that they are talking about KA-YAN and HEI-MAN, he grasps the opportunity to express his love for HEI-MAN. AARON is jealous of ALEX. VIOLET drops him a hint that he can always quit. CHU PAK-TAK of Up Technology invites AARON to take charge of the Research and Development Department of his company with a handsome remuneration. He hopes that AARON will persuade the other three members of A4 to join him too. Goaltech has to pay KIMURA ten million dollars because of an unexpected incident……

title: Episode 16
overview: VIOLET tells PO-PING in her flat that A4 have decided to join Up Technology. As Goaltech is short of flowing capital, SAM needs to take out a $10,000,000 mortgage to pay for IRENE’s medical fee. At a director’s meeting, PO-PING suggests retaining A4 with money, adding that he will inject $50,000,000 to Goaltech at one go. SAM turns down his suggestion though. ALEX has been making things difficult for A4. LING-CHING helps them out by teaching them how to get out of their plight. STEVE and RYAN joke about a client’s peeing difficulty in the washroom. GILBERT happens to be in the washroom and so believes they are teasing him. Everybody but STEVE in the Marketing Department gets a good pay rise. INDERPAL introduces MR. GILL, who used to work at a high-end hotel as chief chef, to LAI. SAM announces at a meeting that their German client is coming to Hong Kong soon……

title: Episode 17
overview: A4 hope that PAK-TAK will agree to make a payment in lieu of notice to Goaltech for them so that they can leave. To their disappointment, he avoids seeing them. ALEX looks for STEVE at a bar to see how he is doing. STEVE feels that he has had enough of Goaltech that he wants to quit desperately. As for ALEX, he is of the impression that whether Goaltech will survive or perish depends entirely on him. AARON visits KIN. ALEX blames her for still seeing AARON. PAUL and the other two members of A4 have been away from their desks for a while for no apparent reason. ALEX finds it strange that when they show up again, they are able to tell why ES has been down. Later, he discovers that LING-CHING has been helping them. He accuses her of not trusting him. AARON calls on KIN again. This time ALEX gives him a punch as well as showing him the door. KIN is so mad about her brother that she decides she might just as well leave……

title: Episode 18
overview: KIN feels that AARON’s quality of life has been affected because of her apartment. As such, she plans to sell it but CHING-CHIK thinks the otherwise. RAJA has booked INDERPAL’s mother a ticket to Hong Kong, leaving INDERPAL with no choice but to continue to work for him. INDERPAL and his friends put their heads together to see how to get rid of RAJA. KIN is afraid of ghosts. CHING-CHIK offers to buy her flat at the price of $800,000 even though she is only asking for $500,000. She thanks him for his generosity. ALEX blames LING-CHING for telling SAM ES’s problems, believing this is the reason why SAM has lost his confidence in him. She feels that the gap between them is getting wider and wider. The business of the restaurant has improved. TSUN-TUNG appears out of nowhere, telling LAI she can have the restaurant to her own if she agrees to go for divorce and give him $500,000. Or else, he says, the restaurant will have to fold……

title: Episode 19
overview: KIN and CHING-CHIK quit together when she discovers at last how CHUN made her into buying the haunted flat. The value of her flat has appreciated a lot after CHING-CHIK has bought it. When KIN is not around, AARON demands him to compensate them the difference. When she learns his unreasonable request, she tells him her agreement with CHING-CHIK, assuring him that CHING-CHIK has not taken any advantage of her. STEVE writes TSUN-TUNG a check for $500,000. LAI tears it as soon as she finds out that STEVE has borrowed money from a finance company. SAM asks A4 about the progress of ES. ALEX jumps to the conclusion that he now thinks very highly of the foursome. AARON has emailed ALEX photos taken of him without his knowledge. ALEX is very upset about the photos. KIN comes to know AARON’s plan to torture ALEX. ALEX, STEVE and INDERPAL have a glass of two together……

title: Episode 20
overview: LING-CHING knows very well that ALEX can end up in prison for selling the information of ES. On the other hand, it is against her principles if she keeps the matter in the dark. VIOLET has learnt about the matter. She demands that STEVE shift the blame onto ALEX. LING-CHING decides to resign and then hide away. ALEX did not realize until then that how much she cares about him and what a difficult position she has been in. Unexpectedly, he sees her in the street. After telling her how difficult days have been without her, he comes up with a solution for ES. CHING-CHIK has found a new job. He employs KIN as his assistant. ALEX’s project is almost complete when he finds to his horror that ES’s programme has been destroyed. He blames AARON for doing it, but the latter points the accusing finger at ELAINE. Finding AARON’s behavior unusual, ALEX decides to follow him. JOHNNY is in VIOLET’s place when PO-PING calls in suddenly……

title: Episode 21
overview: SAM is grilling VIOLET when AARON appears out of the blue. Left with no choice, she hugs AARON, lying to SAM that they are going out with each other. The truth has come out at last. SAM finally realizes that everyone has been conspiring with PO-PING to ruin the ES project and to get Goaltech. PO-PING celebrates his success with VIOLET, SZE-SZE and AARON. He announces that once he makes Chairman he will promote AARON to manager of the Research & Development Department. VIOLET gives IRENE a memory stick, in which stores a video of SAM saying he wished she would never wake up. IRENE is heartbroken. Now that the ES demo has been lost, there is nothing SAM and ALEX can do to talk the German client into doing business with them. PO-PING is taunting SAM when IRENE, who has recovered her memory, shows up to show her support to SAM. ALEX and A3 work day and night to try to work out a solution to ES’s problem……

title: On the Idle Hill of Summer...
overview: In 1914, the world was on the brink of enormous change. Worried by increasing German militarism, the French and the British entered into the Entente Cordiale against Germany and her allies, splitting Europe into opposing sides. Two shots would ignite the powder keg.

title: For Such a Stupid Reason Too...
overview: The assassination of the Austro-Hungarian heir Archduke Franz Ferdinand in June 1914 led to a breakdown in international diplomacy that ultimately led to war.

title: We Must Hack Our Way Through
overview: Following the declaration of war, the German army began to carry out one of the most famous military plans in history. Known as the Schlieffen Plan, its objective was to finish the war in 40 days.

title: Our Hats We Doff to General Joffre
overview: How the British army fought its first battle at the Belgian town of Mons. Despite initial success, the British infantry were sent into retreat after two weeks. Yet as the Germans pressed forward to Paris, apparently invincible, French Commander-in-Chief General Joffre slowly began to build a more solid resistance – which would lead ultimately to Allied victory.

title: This Business May Last a Long Time
overview: The Battle of the Marne in September 1914 ultimately proved to be a pivotal victory of the war for Allied Forces, but, at the time, they were not able to exploit it to bring a swift end to hostilities. Instead, both sides encountered the phenomenon of trench warfare. Culminating at Ypres late in 1914, the trench line stretched from the sea to Switzerland.

title: So Sleep Easy in Your Beds
overview: Attention turns to the battle of the sea. British confidence in the Royal Navy was to be shattered as it suffered defeats – the worst one at Coronel off the coast of South America on 1st November 1914.

title: We Await the Heavenly Manna...
overview: In 1915, France and Britain struggle to keep up with the demand for shells and artillery, but Germany – the most modern industrial system in Europe – have no shortages, having smoothly switched over to war production and introduced the use of gas made by chemical factories. The Allies discover democracy and laissez-faire industry will not suffice if they are to regain ground.

title: Why Don't You Come and Help?!
overview: As Minister of Munitions, David Loyd George was faced with a restricted industrial capability; Britain even imported materials from Germany in key areas. But with the help of US equipment, Lloyd George brought troops up to date, and by 1916 had transformed the armed services into a modern military power.

title: Please God Send Us a Victory...
overview: By Christmas 1914, the bloody impasse in the trench lines on the Western Front saw Lord Kitchener looking elsewhere for victory. In an attempt to sieze control of strategic Turkey, a British naval expedition advanced on the Dardanelles, and allied troops landed at Gallipoli with the aim of taking Constantinople. However, events did not go according to plan and, after 37 weeks, soldiers were evacuated from the beaches.

title: What Are Our Allies Doing?
overview: 1915 brings little progress for the Allies, but a huge German offensive at Gorlice-Tarnow forces the Russians to retreat in the East. The Allied conference at Chantilly agrees on a strategy of simultaneous attacks upon the Central Powers in 1916.

title: Hell Cannot Be So Terrible
overview: One of the bloodiest battles in history, the fighting at Verdun continues throughout the year 1916. French and German forces suffer over 700,000 casualties.

title: For Gawd's Sake Don't Send Me
overview: Following Lord Kitchener's appeal in 1916, the British Army was reinforced by over two million volunteers. Despite the reservations of General Sir Douglas Haig, the new Commander-in-Chief, many of these mew recruits were sent to the scene of Britain's biggest  military endevour – The Battle of the Somme.

title: The Devil is Coming...
overview: The Battle of the Somme – which began in July 1916 and continued into February 19 – leaves 415,000 Brits in a muddy grave.

title: All This It Is Our Duty to Bear
overview: Both sides make heroic bids for victory – but what will they have to show for it?

title: We Are Betrayed, Sold, Lost
overview: The French Army is rallied for a great spring offensive – but mutiny looms when the plans fall foul of the Germans.

title: Right Is More Precious Than Peace
overview: The future of the world is changed when America joins the conflict and the Communists come to power in Russia.

title: Surely We Have Perished
overview: On the Western Front in 1917, the British fought alone for three-and-a-half months during one of the wettest summers Flanders has ever seen. The result was the horrific battle of Passchendale.

title: Fat Rodzianko Has Sent Me Some Nonsense
overview: Russia's short-lived democracy is examined.

title: The Hell Where Youth and Laughter Go
overview: This episode recounts the war's terrible effects; not just the scale of the loss of life, but also the toll it took upon the human spirit.

title: Only War, Nothing but War
overview: Exploring how modern ideas of states' responsibility for their citizens grew out of the horror of "total war".

title: It Was like the End of the World
overview: The story of the German offensive of March 1918, a desperate gamble to grab victory at a stroke.

title: Damn Them, Are They Never Coming In?
overview: As Allied troops fall back in confusion under a German counter-attack, they wait for the arrival of US reinforcements.

title: When Must the End Be?
overview: On 17th July 1918, an Allied counter-attack marks the beginning of the end for Germany.

title: Allah Made Mesopotamia – and Added Flies
overview: Stalemate on the Western Front saw Allied generals look for victory via an alternative route – the Middle East.

title: The Iron Thrones Are Falling
overview: Its allies beaten, Germany faces defeat alone.

title: ...And We Were Young
overview: Relief spreads throgh the ranks on all sides as history's bloodiest conflict finally comes to an end. With the Armistice now in effect, the Allied countries are overcome by a frenzy of joy and exultation.

title: Restaurant in a Hotel Room
overview: Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, owners of KCC Design + Build, find themselves in a tight spot after being hired to transform a tiny Manhattan hotel room into a high-end sushi restaurant and bar.

title: Bar in a Bookstore
overview: When the proprietors of a landmark Brooklyn bookstore approached Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, owners of KCC Design + Build, to help them increase revenue - they didn't realize that 1000 square feet of storage space would be the key to re-imagining their business.

title: Salon Sensation
overview: When Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, owners of KCC Design + Build, are asked to help increase the sales of small Manhattan salon, they discover that a neglected back room could be the answer to dramatically boosting its revenue.

title: B&B Bonanza
overview: After the proprietor of a unique Brooklyn bed & breakfast invites Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, owners of KCC Design + Build, to overhaul her underperforming retail sales area, she's shocked when the enterprising couple come up with an even better way to maximize her revenue.

title: Bowling for Dollars
overview: Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, heads of KCC Design + Build, face their biggest challenge yet when the owner of a beloved New Jersey neighborhood bowling alley asks them to lift his profits out of the gutter.

title: VR Re-Invention
overview: Chrissy and Erik Kopplin, owners of KCC Design + Build, are tasked to help the young owner of a cutting edge virtual reality arcade who just moved into a gigantic 5,000 square foot location in Brooklyn that carries an enormous overhead.

title: Andy Hertzfeld - The first Macintosh programmer...ever
overview: Andy Hertzfeld, the original Macintosh systems programmer, talks about Mac History and how he fell in love with Open Source software.

title: Max Levchin - Co-founder of PayPal
overview: Max Levchin, best known for co-founding PayPal, explains why he is starting his 5th through 7th companies and the virtues of staying up all night.

title: Bill Joy - Sun Microsystems Co-founder
overview: Bill Joy -- the father of Berkeley UNIX -- explains why he was fired from the International House of Pancakes.

title: Brewster Kahle - Internet Archive Founder
overview: Although Brewster Kahle started and sold companies for big bucks, his true love is capturing the whole Internet at the Internet Archive, which he founded and runs today.

title: Tim O'Reilly - Open Source Pioneer
overview: Open Source pioneer Tim O'Reilly noticed the free software didn't come with free printed manuals and so a publishing empire was born.

title: Dave Winer - Father of RSS and Web Logging
overview: Dave Winer has been in the software industry since the days he worked with Mitch Kapor BEFORE Lotus 1-2-3.

title: Dan Drake - Autodesk Co-founder
overview: Dan Drake and a roomful of friends put together $59,030 and started Autodesk with a bunch of bad ideas and one that panned-out -- AutoCAD. Sometimes one is enough.

title: Avram Miller - Co-founder Intel Capital
overview: Avram Miller went from playing jazz piano to building DEC's first PC to starting Intel's venture fund.

title: Anina - High Fashion Meets High Tech
overview: Anina represents the new European tradition in mobile Internet development. And you'd never guess her day job.

title: Dan Bricklin - Inventor of the Spreadsheet
overview: Dan Bricklin invented the spreadsheet -- personal computing's first killer app -- built and lost the first PC software empire and somehow remains a nice guy filled with ideas.

title: Doug Engelbart - Inventor of the Computer Mouse
overview: Doug Engelbart invented computer networks, time sharing, graphical user interfaces, and the mouse--all while driving to work one day in 1951. Really.

title: Bob Kahn - Inventer of TCP/IP
overview: Most nerds know Bob Kahn co-wrote TCP/IP; earlier he worked at Bolt Beranek & Newman where he was the primary architect for the Arpanet.

title: Judy Estrin - Founder, Bridge Communications
overview: Judy Estrin's career ranges from founder of Bridge Communications to CTO of Cisco to running Packet Design LLC. Quite the girl geek, eh?

title: The Big Shrink
overview: While on a date with Rachel, Kudo is attacked by two shady thugs who slip him an experimental drug. The effects of the poison will turn Jimmy’s life upside down!

title: The Kidnapped Debutante
overview: Conan sets out to discover the fate of a wealthy businessman’s kidnapped daughter. His new identity is a secret to everyone but his eccentric inventor friend, Dr. Agasa.

title: Beware of Idols
overview: Pop diva Yoko Okino is being stalked and she's come to star-struck Richard Moore's doorstep for help! Luckily for all involved, Conan is on the job, too.

title: Fish Marks the Spot
overview: Treasure hunt! When a mysterious coded map ends up in the hands of Conan and his new friends from school, the Junior Detective League is born!

title: The Time Bomb Express
overview: On a cross country train, Conan comes across two sketchy men that might be connected to the night of his big shrink! To make matters worse, the hoods are packing a bomb!

title: Tragic Valentine
overview: When Rachel and Serena attend a Valentine’s Day dinner party with some boys, Conan decides to tag along. It’s a good thing, too, because murder is on the menu!

title: The Case of Mysterious Gifts
overview: Dr. Woodman has been receiving children’s toys - and cash - once a month for the last two years, and he has no idea why. Conan and Richard take the case and find some interesting twists along the way.

title: The Art Museum Murder Case
overview: The owner of an art museum is killed by what appears to be someone wearing medieval body armor from the 15th century. Can Conan bring the killer to justice?

title: Festival Fiasco
overview: An author scripts the perfect murder of his ex-partner, complete with an airtight alibi. Can Conan see through the holes in his plot, or has this writer penned himself a perfect happy ending?

title: Deadly Game
overview: A star soccer player's been thrown off his game. A girl claiming to be Jimmy's girlfriend has surfaced, asking for help in finding a kidnapped boy. Are the events connected?

title: The Moonlight Sonata Murder Case (1/2)
overview: There is murder abound on Moonlight Island, and with every victim that is found, the haunting sounds of a classical composition are heard. Conan must solve the crime before all the suspects disappear!

title: Kidnapped: Ayumi
overview: An innocent game of hide-and-seek becomes a race through the city when two thugs kidnap Amy. With the clock running against them, can the Junior Detective League rescue her before it's too late?

title: Mystery Mastermind
overview: Richard finds the missing father of a girl named Michelle. Unfortunately, the next day, the father is found murdered and Michelle has vanished. It’s up to Conan to find the girl before it’s too late!

title: The Shooter
overview: As Conan’s gang fishes on the riverbank, they witness a most unusual sight. Can they convince Inspector Meguire and Richard of its importance before it’s too late?

title: The Two Faced Brother
overview: When Conan has to deal with a disappearing body, an oddly similar pair of brothers, and a jaded law enforcement system, everything is helter-skelter!

title: A Loan Repaid
overview: What starts out as a lazy day soon takes an exciting turn when an antique collector meets his end by the edge of an ancient sword. Can Conan cut through all the confusion?

title: The Case of the Hi-Jacked Department Store
overview: When Conan and his pals find themselves locked in a department store, they stumble right into the hands of a vicious ring of burglars. Will anyone come to their rescue?

title: Wedding Day Blues
overview: While Conan suffers through the wedding of a former teacher, someone is plotting to poison the bride’s favorite drink! What diabolical mind is behind this act of evil?

title: Fashion Sense
overview: What began as an enjoyable day for Conan, Richard, and Rachel, who is being interviewed for a potential job as a fashion model, soon turns toxic. A beautiful young lady has been found dead!

title: The Disappearing Act
overview: Conan, George, Mitch, and Amy explore a haunted house. With strange noises and mysterious screams around every corner, what they find is more bizarre than any ghost ever imagined.

title: Lights, Camera... Murder
overview: When a crewmember is killed, a movie set becomes a crime scene! Everyone involved in the movie is labeled a suspect, but who could be capable of such a horrendous deed?

title: Smooth Sailing (1)
overview: Conan, Richard, and Rachel attempt to relax aboard a cruise ship, but the gang soon ends up being cast into the middle of a dangerous family drama. Can Conan find the killer before he takes out the entire family?

title: Smooth Sailing (2)
overview: Lucas becomes the next victim on the voyage, and it’s revealed that Theodore’s escape from his makeshift cell was only possible with an accomplice. Amid two-timing and back-stabbing, Conan’s on the case.

title: Better Off Forgotten
overview: During Richard’s day at the track, he must dodge a revenge-driven ex-con and help a beautiful woman recover her memories.

title: The Counterfeit Ransom Kidnapping
overview: A dramatic car chase leaves two people dead - or does it? What does a diving watch, a sun tan, and five million dollars add up to? Just another puzzling case for Conan.

title: Jack Attacks!
overview: A dog named Jack kills a college student, shocking the dog’s owner and Conan as well! Conan’s known the pooch forever, and if he doesn’t get to the bottom of the attack, Jack will be put to sleep!

title: Richard's Class Reunion (1)
overview: Conan and Rachel join Richard for the 15-year reunion of Moore’s state-winning Judo team. But when the knock-out Jamie Hummelford turns up dead in her room, reminiscing will have to wait.

title: Richard's Class Reunion (2)
overview: Richard’s class reunion continues, and the killer is still among them. Can Conan apprehend him in time? Everyone’s a suspect in this exciting episode of Case Closed!

title: The Computer Murder
overview: A chance meeting with a corporate executive lands Conan in the middle of a murder investigation. A curious cat, a suspicious limo driver, and pile of melted chocolates have Conan wondering who the killer is.

title: The Missing Melody
overview: When an attorney’s wife is murdered under strange circumstances, Conan steps in to make sense of it all. A music box, a telephone call, and a staple all point to a killer no one would expect.

title: Murder at the Television Studio
overview: Richard Moore stars on the popular television show Prime Time Mystery Hour, and while Conan and Rachel enjoy the broadcast from the audience, a vicious murder takes place at the studio.

title: Murder at the Local Diner
