Geoffrey Zakarian makes a Cucumber Gimlet to pair with Alex Guarnaschelli's Asparagus and Prosciutto in Phyllo. Katie Lee Biegel prepares a main course of Spring Chicken Paillard topped with greens. Sunny Anderson brings her viral-inspired Easy Rainbow Fruit Salad, and Jeff Mauro finishes off the spring feast menu with a family favorite, Lemon Olive Oil Cake with Almond Mascarpone Frosting.

title: Recipes on Repeat
overview: The Kitchen is making the staple recipes that will be on repeat in your home kitchen! Geoffrey Zakarian shows how to make his Sausage, Kale and White Bean Stew. Jeff Mauro makes a tasty Ground Beef Stroganoff with Caramelized Mushrooms and Crispy Onions. Alex Guarnaschelli whips up her current baking obsession, Black and White Cookies, and special guest Marc Murphy from 24 in 24: Last Chef Standing stops by to make his Roasted Cauliflower with Za'atar.

title: Bring the Heat
overview: The Kitchen is featuring recipes that bring the "heat" to dishes -- spices, chile peppers and even table-side fire! Katie Lee Biegel kicks it off with her Middle Eastern Spiced Spatchcock Chicken with Harissa Yogurt. Alex Guarnaschelli turns up the heat with her Mushroom Quesadilla and Blender Avocado Salsa. Sunny Anderson makes her Spicy Honey Glazed Beef with 5-Ingredient Kimchi Fried Rice, and Geoffrey Zakarian literally cranks up the heat with a flambé from his Bananas Foster.

title: Grandma Knows Best
overview: The Kitchen is celebrating grandmas everywhere, because nothing tastes as good as what grandma makes! Jeff Mauro teaches how to make his Grandma Kay's Sausage Bread, and Katie Lee Biegel re-creates one of her favorite dishes growing up, Tomato Dumplings. Then, Sunny Anderson throws it back to the nostalgic days with her Creamy Jalapeno Cheese Grits with Sausage, and Geoffrey Zakarian takes a classic dessert his grandma made and makes the most decadent Baklava Milkshake.

title: Celebrate Summer
overview: The Kitchen hosts are ready for the unofficial start of summer! Sunny Anderson brings in the season with her Gigante Red Margarita Bowl and Lamb Gyro Burgers. Next, Alex Guarnaschelli makes Honey Garlic Soy Grilled Chicken, and Geoffrey Zakarian pairs it with his Smashed Cucumbers and Fennel Chili Crisp Walnut Salad. Katie Lee Biegel and Dairy Queen host a delicious summer celebration, and then Katie bakes her Double Chocolate Strawberry Cookies. Finally, Jeff Mauro puts together the summer quintessential Sunshine Daydream Salad using yellow tomatoes, corn and yellow squash.

title: Fried & True
overview: Air fried, deep fried, even un-fried -- The Kitchen is showing all the ways to fry tasty dishes. Katie Lee Biegel makes Homemade Pizza Bites with a jalapeño ranch dipping sauce. Next, Alex Guarnaschelli shares her fry guide to the perfect Fried Shrimp with Orange Slices and Basil. Geoffrey Zakarian adds an elevated spin on a delicious and juicy Steak Milanese. Then, Sunny Anderson leads a fun fried food taste test and shows how to make Fried Cookie Dough Balls!

title: Meat & Potatoes
overview: The Kitchen is cooking up meat and potatoes all show long! Sunny Anderson kicks it off with Jeff's Cheesy Crispy Vacation Potatoes 2.0. Then, Alex Guarnaschelli's Brown Sugar Vinegar Ribs would pair perfectly with Geoffrey Zakarian's Crispy Potato Cakes with Miso Lime Vinaigrette. Jeff Mauro is dishing out a classic combo with Gus' Chicago Style Hot Dog and Hand Cut Fries. Plus, Maneet Chauhan stops by to give the scoop on the new season of "BBQ Brawl" and makes a Masala Ribeye and Cumin Potatoes.

title: Under the Boardwalk
overview: The Kitchen is celebrating seaside favorites! Sunny Anderson is making her Fish Tacos with Mango Slaw, Geoffrey Zakarian cools things down with his Lemon Drop Slushie, and Katie Lee Biegel cooks up Chicken Sausage with Peppers and Onions Slider Bake. Plus, Alex Guarnaschelli's Fried Clams with Spicy Mayo Dipping Sauce is classic beach fare, and a game of Try or Deny features unexpected boardwalk bites and Jeff Mauro's homemade Rocky Road Fudge.

title: The Kitchen's Block Party
overview: The Kitchen is throwing a summer block party, and you're invited! The delicious shareable recipes include Geoffrey Zakarian's Chicken Kebabs with Tahini Slaw and Garlic-Herb Yogurt, Jeff Mauro's Smoked Kielbasa Burnt Ends, and Alex Guarnaschelli's Summery Stuffed Shells. Plus, the hosts share viral ice cream toppings and cool new serving tricks, and Katie Lee Biegel bakes Strawberry Hand Pies, the perfect sweet treat for a crowd.

title: Tasty Tex-Mex Menu
overview:
Katie Lee Biegel takes the lead by whipping up a delightful queso paired with homemade garlic lime tortilla chips. The combination promises a perfect blend of creamy and zesty flavors, ideal for snacking or sharing.

Geoffrey Zakarian joins in with his take on classic chicken fajitas. Known for his culinary expertise, Geoffrey’s recipe is sure to bring the sizzle and spice that fajitas are famous for. With colorful peppers and tender chicken, this dish is a crowd-pleaser that can easily become a favorite at home.

Alex Guarnaschelli rounds out the menu with her tasty spinach and mushroom vegetable enchiladas. Her approach to this dish highlights the rich flavors of the vegetables, wrapped in soft tortillas and topped with a savory sauce.

title: Summer's Finest
overview: The Kitchen is making a whole menu of delicious dishes featuring summer's best produce! Alex Guarnaschelli's Chicken Skewers with Onions and Red Bell Pepper Sauce are perfectly paired with Geoffrey Zakarian's Watermelon Sunset Cooler. Jeff Mauro has a flavorful Rainbow Cherry Tomato Tart. Sunny Anderson's Easy Grilled Tuna with Blackberry Glaze and Minty Grilled Asparagus Salad is a fabulous main dish with GZ's Summer Panzanella with Peaches and Grilled Halloumi on the side. Katie Lee Biegel's Berry Tiramisu puts a summer twist on a classic, and the hosts share delicious entertaining ideas for a Shark Week party!

title: Burger Bonanza
overview: The Kitchen is putting every twist on burgers that you can imagine! Geoffrey Zakarian gets the day started with a Breakfast Sausage Burger, and Jeff Mauro shares Sarah Mauro's Perfect Turkey Burgers. Katie Lee Biegel makes a viral Cheeseburger Salad, and Alex Guarnaschelli is ready to head to sea with her Shrimp Burger. Plus, Sunny Anderson has a great way to use leftover burger and hot dog buns with her Tiramisu French Toast Bites.

title: Fun with Food
overview: The Kitchen hosts are sharing recipes that are as fun to make as they are to eat! Jeff Mauro gets the party started with Pepperoni Pizza Fun-due, and Alex Guarnaschelli puts together some Chicken, Bok Choy and Scallion Dumplings. Katie Lee Biegel prepares Beef and Lentil Tacos that even the kids will love. Then, it's time for "play dough" with Sunny Anderson's Easy Bacon Cinnamon Roll Twists with Lemon Maple Dip and Geoffrey Zakarian's Almond Croissant Monkey Bread.

title: Eat Up & Cool Down
overview: Beat the heat with recipes from the Kitchen that will fill you up and keep you cool! Geoffrey Zakarian shares a classic Pan Bagnat that's perfect for a picnic, and Alex Guarnaschelli keeps it chill with Cantaloupe Gazpacho. Katie Lee Biegel's Rainbow Noodle Salad is refreshing, and you can't miss with Jeff Mauro's Smoked Salmon Bagel Nachos. Plus, Katie's Frozen Espresso Martini and Sunny Anderson's Frozen Cosmo are super fun drinks to try at home.

title: Backyard BBQ Remix
overview: The Kitchen is taking classic backyard BBQ dishes and giving them a remix! Jeff Mauro makes Hot Elote Street Corn Dip, Katie Lee Biegel gets spicy with Peach Jalapeno Ribs, and Alex Guarnaschelli creates a Beet and Farfalle Pasta Salad. Then, the hosts share easy ways to use up leftover condiments, and a BBQ staple gets a tropical twist in Sunny Anderson's Big Island Baked Beans. For dessert, Geoffrey Zakarian's refreshing Lemon Possets will make guests pucker with joy.

title: The Kitchen's Tool-torials
overview: The Kitchen hosts show how to use your kitchen tools to make cooking easier! Katie Lee Biegel uses the rice cooker and hand mixer to make Sesame Ginger Chicken and Rice Bowls, and Sunny Anderson gets out the mandoline to create her Simple Pizza Frico Crisp. Geoffrey Zakarian turns on the microwave for Mushroom Toast with Herbed Goat Cheese, and Alex Guarnaschelli puts the slow cooker to good use with her Slow Cooker Brownies. Plus, Ayesha Nurdjaja stops by to give the scoop on the new season of "Bobby's Triple Threat" and uses a wire cooling rack to make Tunisian Egg Salad.

title: The Kitchen's Ultimate...
overview: The Kitchen is making the best versions of classic dishes! Jeff Mauro starts it off with The Sandwich King's Ultimate Breakfast Sandwich, and Alex Guarnaschelli makes Chicken Parmesan with Vodka Sauce. Katie Lee Biegel prepares her best Shrimp Scampi, and guest Zac Young stops by to give the scoop on the new season of Halloween Baking Championship and makes The Ultimate Carrot Cake.

title: Handheld Hits
overview: The Kitchen is serving up handheld bites perfect for a tailgate or any outdoor party! Geoffrey Zakarian's Spiked Lemon Iced Tea is the perfect pairing for Alex Guarnaschelli's Deviled Chicken Wings and Katie Lee Biegel's Bacon Bow Tie Crackers and Herb Dip. Then, Jeff Mauro has dessert covered with buttery, delicious Carmelitas, and guest Tony Shalhoub from CNN's "Breaking Bread" shares the recipe for his Spinach Fatayer.

title: Kitchen Comebacks
overview: The Kitchen is bringing back old-school favorites with tasty updates! Geoffrey Zakarian shares his recipe for Stuffed Cabbage Rolls, Jeff Mauro makes Chicken Kiev with Peas and Carrots, and Alex Guarnaschelli has a comfort food classic with her Beef Stroganoff with Egg Noodles. Sunny Anderson and Katie Lee Biegel have the sweet treats covered with Sunny's Quick Waffle Iron PB&J Affair and Katie's Classic Molasses Cookies. Plus, the hosts chat about the new season of Alex vs America!

title: Fall Festival Favorites
overview: The Kitchen hosts are making their favorite treats from fall festivals. Katie Lee Biegel has The Ultimate Pumpkin Bread, which would be delicious with Alex Guarnaschelli's Hot Buttered Rum. Geoffrey Zakarian makes Apple Fritters with Hot Honey Glaze, Sunny Anderson whips up her Easy Fall Vibes Rice Cereal Treats, and Jeff Mauro gets savory with his Honey Fried Turkey Legs with Japanese BBQ Sauce. Plus, a game of Try or Deny features some unexpected fall flavors!

title: Happy Hour ATW
overview: The Kitchen is serving up the perfect drink and app pairings from around the world! Things kick off in Spain with Alex Guarnaschelli's Fresh Raspberry and Coconut Water Sangria paired with Geoffrey Zakarian's Albondigas. Then, India is in the spotlight for Jeff Mauro's Chai White Russian with Cinnamon Gold Foam and Sunny Anderson's Easy Peasy Party Samosas. France is the inspiration for Katie Lee Biegel's viral Charcuterie Chips and Geoffrey's French Gimlet. Plus, the hosts share details about the new season of Harry Potter: Wizards of Baking.

title: Winning Thanksgiving
overview: The Kitchen has tips, tricks, and no-fail recipes to help you win Thanksgiving. The holiday menu kicks off with Geoffrey Zakarian's Pomegranate Moscow Mule and Katie Lee Biegel's Pimento Cheese Pepper Poppers. Then, Jeff Mauro's Coffee Chili Rubbed Turkey Tenderloin with Red Eye BBQ Sauce is the star of the show, paired with sensational sides like Alex Guarnaschelli's Wild and Basmati Rice Timbale with Cranberries and Pecans, as well as Geoffrey's Pommes Aligot. For dessert, Sunny Anderson's Happy Family Sheet-Pan Pie is perfect for sharing at the Thanksgiving table. Plus, get the scoop on the new season of Beat Bobby Flay: Holiday Throwdown!

title: Tastes Like Home
overview: The Kitchen hosts are sharing nostalgic bites from their hometowns! Katie Lee Biegel and Sunny Anderson are bringing the Southern classics with Baked Steak and Gravy and Sunny's Easy Slow Cooker Collard Greens. Geoffrey Zakarian makes a New England Clam Dip, and Jeff Mauro represents the Windy City with an Authentic Chicago-Style Pizza Pillow Puff. Plus, Alex Guarnaschelli's Chocolate Pudding and Cream Roll Cake is inspired by a sweet treat everyone knows and loves.

title: Feast of the Seven Fishes
overview: For the first time, The Kitchen hosts are sharing the ultimate menu for a Christmas Eve tradition filled with impressive seafood dishes. Sunny Anderson's Easy Smokin' Haute White Fish Dip and Katie Lee Biegel's Mussels Arrabiata kick off the holiday feast. Then, Alex Guarnaschelli makes "Fresh" Cod Brandade, Jeff Mauro prepares a decadent Shrimp and Lobster Risotto, and Geoffrey Zakarian's Salt Baked Whole Fish is a showstopping grand finale.

title: Up Your Brunch Game
overview: The Kitchen is sharing recipes to take brunch to the next level! Katie Lee Biegel's Frozen Pistachio Latte and Jeff Mauro's Dubai Pistachio Cheesecake Coffee Cake are a match made in brunch heaven. Then, Geoffrey Zakarian's Crabcake Eggs Benedict and Sunny Anderson's Easy Huevos Rancheros Stuffed Peppers are sure to be the stars of any brunch spread. Finally, Alex Guarnaschelli's Fluffy Pancakes Suzette Style with Raspberry and Orange are the perfect sweet ending.

title: Episode 1
overview: A couple of dads attempt to get their surrogate twins out of the country whilst a bogan night out in Phuket lands four young Aussies in trouble.

title: Episode 2
overview: The WA miner scammed by his Thai girlfriend and inside the famous 'Bangkok Hilton' prison with a convicted Aussie drug trafficker.

title: Episode 3
overview: A young couple get caught in a scam during their dream wedding; an Aussie businessman goes missing; and a heavy metal rocker flies in to save his ailing Dad.

title: Episode 4
overview: He's been busted for drugs but will this young Aussie learn his lesson? A Melbourne traveller left broke and broken-hearted by a love rat.

title: Episode 5
overview: Beau was left for dead by the side of a road after a horrific motorbike crash. Now he wants to discharge himself from hospital.

title: Episode 6
overview: The embassy visits a convicted drug dealer in the world's most notorious prison. But Steven claims he's the innocent victim of an undercover drug sting gone wrong.

title: Episode 7
overview: Young Rhys calls the embassy after his businessman father is arrested and jailed for fraud.

title: Episode 8
overview: Ash contacts the embassy convinced he's going to die after days of partying.

title: Episode 1
overview: Twenty-something Gold Coast bodybuilder Nathan is in Phuket on a holiday of sun, sea, sex and steroids, when disaster strikes. He’s knocked off his hired Harley Davidson by a local tuk-tuk driver and ends up in hospital, without travel insurance.

title: Episode 2
overview: Expat ex-digger Ben arrives at the embassy distraught and in tears. His young Thai wife has gone missing without a trace and he’s convinced she’s been taken against her will, kidnapped by a jealous ex-boyfriend. He’s also terrified her life may be in danger.

title: Episode 3
overview: WA builder, Dan, and his fiancee Elle are having their first ever holiday together in Bangkok – and enjoying the time of their lives. But after a big night out on the dance floor, it all goes horribly wrong.

title: Episode 4
overview: Twenty-something best mates from Bendigo, Rhys and Benny, are on their first-ever overseas holiday together – and can’t believe their luck! They’re staying in the heart of Phuket and the sky’s the limit.

title: Episode 5
overview: When a massive earthquake strikes Nepal hundreds of traumatised and injured Aussie travellers need to be evacuated to Thailand. 19-year-old Alex from Sydney is in Phuket for a kickboxing holiday with his mates.

title: Episode 6
overview: The embassy is overwhelmed when a ferry incident occurs and they try to find out if any Australians were on board. A man's intentions of marrying a Vietnamese woman may not go to plan.

title: Episode 7
overview: Queenslander Sam and his German girlfriend Sandra met and fell in love in Thailand. After a long distance relationship, they've finally decided to leave their respective countries and begin a life together in Chiang Mail.

title: Episode 8
overview: Jacob has been locked up in a Thai prison for the past nine months, awaiting trial for a high-grade drug trafficking offence that could carry the death penalty.

title: Episode 1
overview: Jason is pulled aside and made to sign a document after he says the word `bomb' on an airplane; a pair of Australian boys abandoned by their mother in Bali must find their way home; Bella's dog eats part of her passport.

title: Episode 2
overview: Aidan is desperate to get deported from Bali back to Australia, but his brother Jackson has gone missing. Kylie's fairytale wedding is in tatters. A grandmother threatens to go on a hunger strike at the airport.

title: Episode 3
overview: Jenny's holiday has turned into a nightmare: she was collecting her son's dirty laundry from his hotel room in Bali and got caught up in a surprise immigration raid. Authorities have confiscated her passport and now Jenny is stuck.

title: Episode 4
overview: 59-year-old Joanne came to Thailand for a body makeover. She's had a tummy tuck and liposuction to look her best for her daughter's wedding. She loses her passport and the wound from her tummy tuck gets infected.

title: Episode 5
overview: Wayne has no money, no passport and a mountain of debt. Homeless and out of options, he's back at the consulate in Bali with sobering news. But consular officer Tom Walter isn't sure if he can trust Wayne's story.

title: Episode 6
overview: 56-year-old Michael is living every parent's worst nightmare. His six-year-old son has been missing for three months now. His ex wife didn't return him after a routine weekend visit, and now he fears that she's trying to smuggle him out of Bali.

title: Episode 7
overview: Family man Laurie, an offshore oil rigger, is fresh out of jail and claims he's been framed. He's been charged with causing grievous bodily harm after he was involved in a brawl 12 months ago.

title: Episode 8
overview: Aussie expat, Roger arrives at the embassy after being robbed by a sex worker. He says they burst into his hotel room and stole $800 Aussie dollars, along with his drivers licence and international money

title: Episode 9
overview: Retired construction worker, Ivan, has come to the Embassy with a major financial problem. He purchased a luxury condo in Phuket two years ago, but he still hasn't received the ownership papers.

title: Episode 10
overview: Aussie card sharks, John and Avon, are busted by Thai police in an anti-gambling raid on their Pattaya Bridge Club. The pair insists there's no betting going on but the whole club is under arrest.

title: Start and Deadline
overview: Alex gets out of prison and is determined to repair himself from past sins. He looks for Aryati, his old lover but only finds a dead end. Alex's freedom makes Fathir, invite Alex back to the Black Dragon. In his search for Aryati, he gets a clue from a mysterious hooded man who knows Aryati's whereabouts.

title: Greetings from an Old Friend
overview: Aryati gives Alex a second chance before he and Kayla leave town. Alex agrees but the Black Dragon members continue to terrorize Alex to join.

title: Snake in The Grass
overview: The members of the Black Dragon are killed again, Ariel and Toba's suspicion of Alex is getting stronger. Meanwhile, the competition between the Black Dragon and the Red Ax led by Silas began to heat up.

title: Spark of War
overview: Alex, the Black Dragon and the Red Ax are involved in a vicious circle of mafia wars. The figure of the man in the black hood began to reveal himself.

title: Victim
overview: Aryati and Kayla are in danger. In order to save them, Alex must do the work of the Black Dragon, Silas is at stake.

title: Redemption
overview: The war must end. Alex, Toba and Rizal must ally against the enemy under cover. Ariel who was launching an attack for her personal ambition. Alex has no other choice but to return to being a wolf for the people he loves. Redemption will end.

title: Keluar Dari Bayangan
overview: Alex works with Denpator to find info about the Black Dragon. Meanwhile, the Black Dragon drug market is threatened by a new drug, Blue Paradise, which is circulated through the Balabadik post by Red Spiders.

title: Musuh Dalam Selimut
overview: Alex knew that his family was in danger because he saw Reno. He asks Margo to tell her the location of her family, but it's not only Alex who's looking for them, the Black Dragons are after Aryati and Kayla.

title: Sang Penghianat
overview: Alex chases Aryati and Kayla back to Jakarta. In Jakarta, Norman, Reno and Bintang are waiting for them at the station. Alex's family struggle ensues, whoever wins will be able to control Alex.

title: Amarah
overview: Alex knows his family is dead, he attacks the Denpator and the Black Dragon in anger. The Red Spider was the one who saved his family before being killed by Reno's men. Alex is indebted to the Red Spider, but he wants his family to be safe.

title: Jaring Laba-Laba
overview: The Blue Paradise compounder became the target of many people. Alex who is in debt to the Red Spider must save him. At a Pier he confronts Reno and Robert, to bring out the beleaguered Norman.

title: Penguasa Tunggal
overview: Reno takes over Balabadik, he declares war on Alex, and the remnants of the Denpator. Alex had to run away, but many of his friends didn't make it. Alex finally turned himself in to the Police.

title: Kesempatan Terakhir
overview: Alex turns out to have a plan in the Police prison. He gets help from his friend Margo, but instead they are taken to a field to be executed.

title: Tawa Paling Akhir
overview: Last chance to stop Reno Before he becomes even stronger, all parties must ally and put aside their differences, but in the end there must be one ruler?

title: Satyanweshi Pother Kanta
overview: Byomkesh disentangles himself as the truth-seeker, who with friend and writer Ajit uncoils the mystery behind the bizarre murders.

title: Makorshar Rosh Artham Anartham
overview: Byomkesh is on one of his private missions with Ajit. As he decides upon setting his foot forward on a new journey, he meets Satyabati for the first time.

title: Rakter Daag - Part 1
overview: Truth seeker Byomkesh indulges in romance and poetry, till a flamboyant Satyakam comes to him with a weird proposal: to investigate his own murder mystery.

title: Rakter Daag - Part 2
overview: Satyakam predicted his murder that has come true. Byomkesh has to reach to the root cause of the murder and find out what lead him to predict his own end.

title: Raktamukhi Neela
overview: A theft at Maharaj Ramendra Singha's palace leads Byomkesh to investigate a royal case of the Blue Sapphire.

title: Shajaru'r Kanta - Part 1
overview: When industrialist Debashish becomes the target of a ruthless murder plan, Byomkesh enters the scene to unmask the person.

title: Shajaru'r Kanta - Part 2
overview: Byomkesh comes to know Debashish has an unhappy marital life with wife Deepa, as she loved someone else. Is the murderer someone really close then?

title: Agnibaan Part 1
overview: A young girl named Rekha dies mysteriously in her home in Byomkesh's neighbourhood. Is this death connected to her secret relationship?

title: Agnibaan Part 2
overview: As Byomkesh gets busy investigating the mystery of the Rekha's demise, another peculiar death occurs in her family.

title: Tetallisher Monwantor
overview: Amidst the deaths during the famine across Bengal, a disturbed Byomkesh receives a letter. Can he fulfill the last wish of a man predicting his own death?

title: Khnuji Khnuji Nari
overview: Byomkesh discovers a letter that Rameshwar sent to a man named Bishu, with a strange message. Is there a mysterious connection between Rameshwar and Bishu?

title: Hena-Monyota
overview: Byomkesh is appointed to discover the truth behind the mysterious death of Henna Mullick, a guest at the Samaddar family home.

title: Rohoshyomoy Mouth Organ
overview: Byomkesh interrogates the members of the Samaddar family to find Henna's assailant.

title: Deshbhager Khesharat
overview: As Byomkesh goes undercover, he unearths a larger conspiracy in the concluding part of the story.

title: Mrigaya
overview: A sudden disappearance leaves everyone at the Chorabali estate in a fix. Byomkesh reaches soon after and discovers several skeletons in the closet of the zamindari household.

title: Shobdobhed
overview: A tiger has been presumable roaming the estate as its growl can be heard often. While out on morning walk, Byomkesh and Ajit spot a mud hut in the middle of nowhere. Will the mystery culminate here?

title: Prothom Pawrbo
overview: Satyanweshi Byomkesh Bakshi, along with friend Ajit, embarks upon the thrilling journey of untangling a spine-chilling murder mystery where everyone is a suspect, and the truth has multiple faces.

title: Dwitiyo Pawrbo
overview: Nishanath Sen abruptly stops the investigation after Byomkesh and Ajit's visit to Rosy Mansion. However, destiny brings Byomkesh back to the colony after he gets a sudden call from Bijoy.

title: Tritiyo Pawrbo
overview: The sudden demise of Nishanath Sen makes everyone in the colony a suspect. As Byomkesh starts the investigation by searching for missing Rashik and an old convict Laal Singh, more deaths follow.

title: Choturtho Pawrbo
overview: Bonolokkhi makes a startling revelation, which leads Byomkesh to unmask the truth in the labyrinth of lies, betrayals and scandals.

title: Welcome to Max Motors
overview: Welcome to Butler, Missouri, where the wheeling and dealing at Max Motors never stops. Owner Mark Muller is an old-fashioned businessman with an unorthodox style that always shocks and scares his baby brother, Chicago radio legend, Erich "Mancow" Muller, who's a partner in Max Motors. Despite Mancow's pleas to play it safe, Mark promises his staff he'll blow up a car "like in the movies" if they meet their monthly sales goal.

title: Muller's Way
overview: Max Motors' ace salesman, "Cowboy" Matt Harvey is in trouble with the law and turns to Mark for help. If Matt can clean up his act, and get into riding like he did back when he was a professional bull rider, Mark will bail him out. Meanwhile, Mancow learns the hard way how to do business in Butler when he spends a day out with the repo team.

title: Midnight Madness
overview: In an attempt to bring some big city pizzazz to the dealership, Mancow bets Mark that a "Midnight Madness" sale will generate a ton of business for Max Motors. What Mancow doesn't understand is that things work a whole lot different in the country. Meanwhile, Mark hires a new personal assistant, Jason, who has to deal with being "the new guy" at work.

title: Cowboys and Aliens
overview: When Mancow shows up in Butler with a toy drone, Mark hatches a plan to throw one of his most creative sales promotions ever–it's an elaborate scheme involving aliens, UFO's and out-of-this-world prices. But will the staff meet the challenge set by the boss?

title: The Great Gun Buyback
overview: In order to create buzz at the dealership, Mark collaborates with the local Sherriff's department to host a gun buyback event where the community can trade in their unwanted weapons for cash. Old and dangerous weapons are destroyed on the spot and Mark adds a couple of beauties to his private collection. Meanwhile, Mark's son, Max turns to his father for a job. Against his better judgment, Mark gives him a shot.

title: Urban Cowboy
overview: When Mancow calls Mark with an opportunity to buy his dream car–a 1957 Black Cadillac convertible, Mark immediately flies to Chicago to seal the deal. Back at Max Motors, Rod is left in charge of the dealership and realizes it's not that easy to be the boss.

title: Demolition Men
overview: With a bunch of old trade-in cars destined for the scrap yard, Mark gets an idea to motivate the sales staff and have some fun. His three top salesmen that week will get to ride against him in a demolition derby contest. But when Mancow finds out that Mark hasn't included him to competition, he takes matters into his own hands.

title: Fight Night
overview: Mark hosts an evening of cage-fighting at the Max Motors lot to sponsor Mongo's return to the sport while also attracting huge crowds to the dealership. As Mongo trains for the fight of his life, Mancow sees an opportunity to cash in as his new manager. Meanwhile, Larry's sanity is stretched to its limit trying to organize the big event around Mark's increasingly steep demands.

title: Respect the Vet
overview: The dealership is forced to scramble when their weekend sales event falls through. At the last minute, Mark decides to host a Veteran's Appreciation Day, leaving Larry in charge of planning the logistics. Meanwhile, Amy bets Mark that he can't go a week without buying another car for his personal collection, and Mark tries his best not to cave in to temptation.

title: Shine On
overview: Mark and his son Matt decide get into the moonshine business, and enlist the aid of Butler's best brewers. But to get Erich on board, they'll have to prove to him that moonshine isn't just for local folks. Meanwhile, Jason struggles to balance his duties for Mark while also training Mongo for his upcoming cage-fights.

title: Family Circus
overview: When the rodeo comes to Butler, Mark is caught under-staffed during the busiest weekend of the year, forcing him to recruit his wife Amy and their three sons to work the dealership. Meanwhile, Erich butts heads with the local radio station when he brings his big-city shock-jock radio show to small town Butler.

title: Speed Auction
overview: Mark's mother is in town to spend some quality time with the family. But Mark is so overwhelmed with getting the dealership's old trade-ins to one of Missouri's biggest auctions that he can't find time for his mother. Meanwhile, Erich must cover for Mark by showing their mother what Butler has to offer.

title: The Art of the Retreat
overview: Construction has commenced on the Max Motors lot and brings business to a standstill. Mark shuts things down at the dealership and invites Erich and the boys to a work retreat Max Motors style. Meanwhile Larry and a skeletal crew secretly prep for the Five Dollar Car Sale!

title: Going Big Time
overview: Mark and the Max Motors crew are gearing up for a big reveal on the lot, but Mark's having a hard time with "Cowboy" Matt Harvey and must teach him a lesson. Meanwhile, Erich has been given the responsibility of acquiring fireworks for Max Motors' big reveal. Not knowing where to begin, Erich recruits Rod to be his fireworks liaison to Butler.

title: Pilot
overview: A documentary crew discovers a historic Midwestern newspaper and the publisher trying to revive it.

title: The Five W's
overview: Ned starts slowly with his volunteer crew until Esmeralda forces them to scramble for stories.

title: Buddy and the Dude
overview: Ned tags along on Mare's consumer sting story after Esmeralda gets in his head.

title: TTT vs the Blogger
overview: Ned and Esmeralda go against a high school blog; Mare and Oscar cover a teacher's last production.

title: Scam Alert!
overview: Ned chases a story about a scammer operating through a dating app and learns Esmeralda was a victim.

title: Churnalism
overview: Ned takes over Esmeralda's advertorials and assigns the staff to test products themselves.

title: I Love You
overview: With Marv camped out in the newsroom, the staff's unresolved attitudes toward authority bubble up.

title: Church and State
overview: Mare uncovers a story that pits the Truth Teller against its owner; Ned is embarrassed by his past.

title: Matching Ponchos
overview: Ned and Mare take a long road trip to interview a possible cult leader; Ken goes on an apology tour.

title: The Ohio Journalism Awards
overview: Ned stifles his desire to win at the Ohio Journalism Awards; Nicole uncovers Detrick's monogamy.
Yusuke no Sho (Yusuke's Chapter)

title: Hacking, Phreaking & Juvenile Delinquency
overview: In a time when tinkering with technology was a guarantee for ridicule and torment, a small group of curious explorers were connecting to computer systems, traversing the telephone network, and occasionally causing mischief. Speaking at CypherCon 3.0, Joe Grand talks about previously unheard stories of his early days as a hacker, phone phreak, and troublemaker, following a rebellious path towards the eventual redirection of his passion to serve the greater good.

title: Hacking a Better Tomorrow
overview: A self-taught hacker, modder and maker Benjamin Heckendorn - better known as Ben Heck is host of element14's The Ben Heck Show, a weekly web series in which Ben tackles fun and interesting projects across a wide range of topics. In this exclusive CypherCon 3.0 key note presentation, Ben discusses his beginnings, where he is today and how you can help hack a better tomorrow.

title: Forensics When You're Broke
overview: Exploring the forensic methodology and tasks using free open source software. We won't be focusing on what tools are available, the focus of the presentation is explaining the methodology and where these tools fit in to the process to get the job done.

title: Hack in the Day
overview: This talk will be about hacking/phreaking in the late 1980's, early 1990's, and what the scene was like back then as compared to present times. Tips and tricks that were considered cutting edge back then, and some tricks that still work today. The general attitude around hacking, and hacking 'groups' has matured and evolved over the years, and this talk will give a snapshot into some of the origins of how we got to where we are at today. This will be a talk that touches not only on technical aspects, but also on social aspects of historical hacking.

title: Developer Friendly Cryptography
overview: Brice Williams will look at some common cryptography usage errors and why popular libraries often fall short. He will also discuss nuances such as backwards compatibility, FIPS 140-2 validation, and weak standards such as JOSE/JWT that contribute to the overall confusion. Advice is also provided to ensure more secure cryptographic implementations are used.

title: Hacking Academia
overview: Anita will present some ideas about how three communities with different incentives, yet the same goals, can work together to shorten the time to discovery and overcome many of the obstacles that impeded progress in the sciences centuries earlier.

title: Attacking Wireless Devices Using SDR
overview: In this talk, we'll be exploring how wireless communication works. We'll capture digital data live (with Software-Defined Radio [SDR]), and see how the actual bits are transmitted. From here, we'll see how to view, listen to, manipulate, and replay wireless signals. We'll also look at interrupting wireless communication, and finally, we'll even generate new radio waves from scratch.

title: SOAR: Operating at Attacker Speed
overview: Security Orchestration, Automation and Response (SOAR) enables defenders to operate at attacker speed by codifying detection and response expertise into automation playbooks. We will examine the core components of SOAR, skills required to design and implement it, common use cases in detection and response, and potential opportunities for security control testing in a defense-in-depth environment.

title: When Developers Fail to Secure
overview: David has found some pretty stupid security mistakes. Blatantly overlooked controls, or flat out lazy system admins. David will show real-world examples of misuse & abuse, and improper data handling of passwords inside application code. We must remember a breech in one security system, can lead to a breach on another system because of the implicit trust relationships we build to get the job done.

title: What the Fungi? How to Grow Your Own Nootropics
overview: Learn how mushrooms are medicinal and doing some amazing things like fighting cancer, boosting immunity, improving cognition, etc. In this presentation learn which compounds mushrooms produce that are medicinal and how you can easily grow them at home. We'll review the latest research from clinical trials and unveil the low cost, high yield techniques gleaned from anonymous mushroom cultivators.

title: Text Mining: Reading Between the Lines
overview: "Read between the lines" usually refers to one's ability to infer hidden meaning from text. This talk will look at the tools and efforts needed for "Text Mining". Using data mining techniques to infer meaning, misconceptions, or hidden agendas from common documents. Learn a general understanding of the process along with a list of tools & services to start text mining right away.

title: SAEDY - Subversion & Espionage Directed Against You
overview: Espionage is the practice of secretly gathering information about a foreign government or a competing industry, with the objective of placing one's own government or corporation at a strategic or financial advantage. Presenting case examples of military and industrial espionage, Judy illustrates how tricks of the spy trade are parleyed against ordinary individuals every day.

title: The Arms Race
overview: United States military veteran Ken Grigas talks about his time in service during the "Cold War" between the Unites States and U.S.S.R.

title: Alice in ICSLand
overview: The past decade has made it clear that threats of cyber attacks on Industrial Control Systems (ICS) is real, and poses a fundamental risk to our way of life. The demand of ICS security professionals far exceeds the supply. Mark and Lesley of Dragos Inc. will provide an overview of some great ways to learn about the operational and technical aspects of ICS networks without breaking the bank.

title: How to "Theoretically" Kill a Continent
overview: The human body is terrifyingly vulnerable. With the rise of novel gene-editing techniques and our increasing knowledge of genomics, we are forced to confront the idea of a microscopic enemy. This talk will explore the not-so-theoretical aftermath of an unchecked pandemic of unknown origin, the monsters we created in our own medical hubris, and the ever-present threat of bio-terrorism.

title: Embedding Security
overview: Sequestered, cordoned off, separated, even out of touch. These words have been used by plenty of non-infosec folks. From Dev teams to Admins, Sales people and more, we get looked at as these mystical people who say nO! The people who are stopping others from doing their job. Maybe it is time for our team to take a different approach...

title: Handshakes & Hashes, Plucking Passwords from Thin Air
overview: New developments in Hashcat have brought some new WiFi attack techniques to light. We've taken concepts from classic WiFi attacks, added a little special sauce, and created a whole new attack vector for WiFi devices everywhere. All it takes is a friendly introduction and a little cracking time to gain access to protected networks. Come get some code and that uneasy feeling of being vulnerable.

title: Hidden in Plain Sight, Steganography & Digital Watermarking
overview: Steganography is the practice of hiding a message "in plain sight" inside an image, video, sound, text, or file. The practice goes back centuries, and in recent years has seen a rise in use for digital watermarking. It can be used for communication, leak prevention, or copyright protection. We'll look at techniques, analysis, and detection through the lens of digital watermarking.

title: An Interdisciplinary View of Risk, Applications for Security
overview: In 2016, 791,820,040 data records were breached in the United States, which averages two breaches per American. France, Canada and Taiwan also encountered breaches above or near their population levels - or double it. This begs the question: are we doing and spending enough for security? This study of ethical risk considers how to calculate risk and engineer solutions for this new environment.

title: Hack Dumberly Not Smarterer
overview: Tim Medin discuss the dumbest red team tricks and hacks encountered over the years. We are going to take the A out of APT, because so few attackers really need to use advanced techniques. We'll also discuss the simple defenses that make an attacker's life much more difficult.

title: Crypt-Oh No
overview: Even when the right crypto primitives are chosen, subtle programming mistakes can lead to issues with the efficacy of the encryption. This presentation is aimed at helping developers avoid common cryptography pitfalls when encrypting sensitive data by giving guidance on what algorithms to choose and identifying common implementation issues observed in real-world applications.

Satrio told about the kindness of his brother, Rahmat, who had been willing to accommodate him all this time. After Satrio and Dian finally started dating, Dian was introduced to Intan, Satrio's sister-in-law. She is impressed by Intan's kindness but is surprised by ...

title: Starting Point
overview: Yuri, who has lost their memory, wakes up aboard the Interstellar Cruiser D.Q.O. They are taken by Setsu to participate in a meeting to identify the "Gnosia," a being that attacks and annihilates humans.

title: Loops
overview: Yuri, who looped back to the first day, attends the meeting knowing who the Gnosia is. Yuri tries to cast suspicion on SQ, but the discussion doesn't progress as expected...?

title: New Crew Members
overview: Shigemichi and Stella join the group, and a meeting is held with seven people. During the meeting, Yuri uses their intuition to identify the Gnosia, but they struggle to convince the other crew members.

title: Silver Key
overview: Despite identifying the Gnosia and surviving, Yuri finds themself back at the first day in a daze, when a person with an unusual presence, Yuriko, appears before them. She seems to know something, but...?

title: Wild Intuition
overview: New crew members Comet and Chipie join the meeting. Two of the crew claim to be engineers, but Racio argues against voting for them, resulting in the votes going to...?

title: Nostalgic Flowers
overview: Yuri attends the meeting in a new role as the "Guardian Angel." With Jonas and Kukrushka joining, the meeting now has 13 people, and as the situation becomes chaotic, one crew member raises their hand.

title: Understand?
overview: Otome and Remnan join in and the meeting is about to begin, but the other new crew member, Sha-Ming, refuses to come out of his room. Meanwhile, Shigemichi begins to talk about his feelings for Stella.

title: Guard Duty
overview: Remnan and Kukrushka step forward as "Guard Duty," a role that confirms they are human. As the number of positions increases and the meeting becomes more complicated, Sha-Ming, who is suspected by Kukrushka, takes a certain action...

title: World of Gnosia
overview: Yuri awakens as a Gnosia. Though they feel hesitant about deceiving their fellow crew members, they are touched by the feelings of Comet, who shares their position, and resolve to fulfill their role as promised to Setsu.

title: Citizen Slime
overview: Yuri, who has looped once again, is astonished by their new appearance. Amidst this, the meeting is postponed due to Sha-Ming's absence, and Raqio reveals the secret of the Silver Key to the bewildered Yuri.
Upon waking up, Yuri finds themself in a loop where they and SQ are on Guard Duty. Knowing that they are both human, the two grow closer, and eventually SQ reveals her true "identity"—.

title: Allacosia
overview: Gina, who intensely dislikes lying and deceiving others, is confided in about the loops by Yuri. Recalling a painful past, she expresses her fears and resistance toward becoming a Gnosia.

title: Interlude
overview: Before the meeting, Setsu loses consciousness and is taken to the Sickbay. As they share the information they have acquired, Yuri suggests that Setsu, who appears exhausted from having repeated hundreds of loops, take a break. The "Truth Arc" begins...

title: 15-Person Meeting
overview: "If you survive this loop, I'll tell you everything." Yuri, presented with a condition by Yuriko, attends a meeting where all 15 crew members are gathered. However, once the meeting begins, an unexpected proposal comes from Yuriko.

title: The Final Problem
overview: Raqio, who was identified as a Gnosia by the Engineer, Yuri, claims innocence based on a certain action. The emergence of an AC Follower throws the meeting into chaos, and Yuri is cornered.

title: Truth
overview: When Yuri awakens, it's in a world line where the ship has escaped Gnosia contamination. As Yuri is bewildered by Kukrushka's implication of "the end of the universe," an alarm blares detecting an abnormal biological reaction.

title: Bug
overview: Yuri learns the truth: that they are a "Bug" that shouldn't exist. They struggle to escape the time loop and the cosmic collapse caused by their dual existence, but...?

title: A World With a Future
overview: Yuri awakens on "DAY 0," the day before the loop they always experience and before escaping Liu-An. They meet Setsu there, but Setsu seems unaware of the Silver Key or the loops...

title: Epilogue
overview: Yuri has escaped the loop, but the crew members have lost all memory of Setsu. On the planet where they land, Yuri follows Setsu's traces, only to be confronted with the harsh fact that Setsu's very existence has vanished.

title: To the World of Stars
overview: In order to end Setsu's loop, Yuri obtains Raqio's "Silver Key." As Yuri tries to host the key once again, Raqio calls out to them.

title: End Point and Starting Point
overview: Yuri reunites with Setsu on the other side of the dimensional door. They find themselves in the world line before they received the Silver Key that first awakened them. And so, their final discussion begins――

title: New York
overview: Six experts set out in search of some of New York's most remarkable hidden stories. Why guests can't go up Lady Liberty's torch; What's behind the famous 21 Club's secret door; how the city's top tourist attraction put cowboys out of work.

title: San Francisco
overview: Five experts go searching for some of San Francisco's most remarkable and surprising secrets. An exploration of little-known stories behind San Francisco landmarks and locations, including its golden fire hydrant and Dutch windmills.

title: London
overview: Highlighting some of the most amazing stories from London that has never been heard before. A unique tour of London explores objects with secret histories, including its black cabs, the Marble Arch and the Horse Guards Clock.

title: Berlin
overview: A unique tour of Berlin hunts for little-known stories hidden in the city's famous landmarks, obscure sites, and even in the food.

title: Paris
overview: What are Notre Dame's gargoyles guarding? What do five ordinary flagstones have to do with one of the most notorious killing machines ever created? What is the Phantom of the Opera's connection to a statue on the Seine? Paris has one of the richest and most exciting histories of any city in the world but some of its most fascinating stories have been lost to the ages. Enjoy this one-of-a-kind tour as we reveal its many secrets, hiding in catacombs and cathedrals, sidewalks and cemeteries, and along its famous river.

title: Singapore
overview: In the final episode, discover where to get a Michelin star meal for less than three dollars and learn the amazing history of Hawker Food; and tour Singapore with “Toilet Man” to find out how beautiful gardens and obsessively clean toilets made the city rich.
